### Bernard Davis IV — 2024-03-09T23:32:32+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/nnemf-blocking-clothing.28672/post-332342>

Which company has the highest quality nnEMF blocking clothing?

Does anyone have any experience or data on the subject?

### Saichi — 2024-03-10T17:10:28+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/nnemf-blocking-clothing.28672/post-332364>

Can't wear any metal unless it's under leather clothing anywhere around mmWaves.

Can't wear any nano-silver since it adds to nano/micro tech formation in the body.

### Joseph LeBlanc — 2024-03-10T21:39:30+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/nnemf-blocking-clothing.28672/post-332367>

What would happen if nnEMF got trapped under the clothing? Never a perfect seal is it? Otherwise you would suffocate

### Pratima — 2024-03-10T22:17:46+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/nnemf-blocking-clothing.28672/post-332369>

> [Saichi said:](/goto/post?id=332364)
>
> Can't wear any metal unless it's under leather clothing anywhere around mmWaves.
>
> Can't wear any nano-silver since it adds to nano/micro tech formation in the body.

Why is it ok under leather.......what is special about leather?

### Anthony Smith — 2024-03-10T22:34:04+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/nnemf-blocking-clothing.28672/post-332373>

The purpose of nnEMF clothing is to block - RF, not electric or magnetic fields. The metallic content of the fabric reflects the RF protecting the wearer (think light and mirror). If you wear a hoodie made of blocking fabric it will protect you from the sides and back but not the front and what goes in the front is reflected back by the fabric behind your head. Being metallic this clothing will attract and absorb electric fields. So if you are inside in an area with high 60Hz AC electric fields your exposure to this nnEMF could be increased. nnEMF clothing does nothing to protect against magnetic fields.

Would I personally wear nnEMF protective clothing . . . under certain circumstances yes. When traveling, the advantages out way the disadvantages. Also if pregnant.

### Martinlillico — 2024-03-12T22:43:15+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/led-indoor-lights.28682/post-332468>

Would it be better to replace indoor lighting from cool white LED light bulbs
to warm white LED bulbs?

### coho3131 — 2024-03-13T01:32:43+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/led-indoor-lights.28682/post-332486>

It might be a little better, but it won't make much difference compared to no ALAN.
Candlelight at night might be the best source of light, but if you have significant health issues that you are trying to eliminate, I would even try not to use any candles or ALAN if possible.

### Martinlillico — 2024-03-13T09:57:36+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/led-indoor-lights.28682/post-332491>

Hello thank you for the reply and I don’t have any health issues so I think I will try the candle light.i have blue light blocking glasses and i was considering buying some bulbs that are full spectrum And have different setting so i can use red light or amber light at night if need do you think it’s something worth investing in?

There are people here who could probably give you a better answer than me, but I think you would want to test the bulbs with a spectroscope to confirm the wavelengths you are seeking. I would not be surprised if a dim incandescent bulb is better than any of these new technology bulbs.

### JanSz — 2024-03-13T19:04:55+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/led-indoor-lights.28682/post-332516>

Remembering that you spend lots of time outside, so a light vise you are likely better than 90% or more peoples.
Candle lights are good health vise
but
they will make a mess of the ceilings in your flat.
Mine got so much sooth that when my girlfriend moved in, she was scraping sheets of sooth from ceilings. They were falling off in large pieces.
So, if you live in the cave, candles are acceptable.
..

# Thread: Phone Lines EMF
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/phone-lines-emf.28692/>
**Subforum:** The EMF Rx
**Posts:** 8
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### jeremiasbtome — 2024-03-17T19:00:32+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/phone-lines-emf.28692/post-332607>

These are phone lines, are they as bad as Powerlines or Cell towers? Like living beside a powerline is horrible same with cell tower, but is phone line the same?

### Joseph LeBlanc — 2024-03-17T19:49:03+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/phone-lines-emf.28692/post-332609>

Too many variables to say one way or the other.

For example:
How close are you to power lines?
How electrosensitive are you?
What is your redox like?
How much electricity is flowing thru the lines?
What elevation are you at?
What kind of cell towers are you referring to?
Proximity to towers?
Are you holding a device talking to the towers?
If 5G, are you between the device and tower?
Are you near lots of water? In water?

And I'm sure there are other factors I'm not considering

### Joseph LeBlanc — 2024-03-17T19:55:08+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/phone-lines-emf.28692/post-332610>

I completely misread your question lol. Thought you were asking for comparison between powerlines and cell towers.

Those look like powerlines to me.

If the lines are truly only servicing hardlined phones, I'm sure they would not be nearly as bad as power lines and cell towers.

### jeremiasbtome — 2024-03-17T20:14:11+0200

# Thread: Eyes see EMFS
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/eyes-see-emfs.28695/>
**Subforum:** The EMF Rx
**Posts:** 5
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### jeremiasbtome — 2024-03-18T20:12:17+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/eyes-see-emfs.28695/post-332641>

Whenever I'm outside In the last few hours of the day whenever I look at a phone line/ tv satellite or certain electrical devices, it always is blurry to me. Can our EYES possibly see High EMFS? I know they sense it, but is it possible Im seeing it?

### Anthony Smith — 2024-03-19T18:13:50+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/eyes-see-emfs.28695/post-332666>

A phone line carries about 50V DC along with the phone signal. A TV satellite is receiving / transmitting a signal but not power. Electrical power lines carry power at different AC voltage levels depending where they are in relation to the power plant and consumer. Cell towers all have different frequencies they broadcast depending on the company they belong to. This is all energy at a huge range of frequency from 60Hz (60x per second) electric to a 5G (generation) cell signal that could be 20GHz (20 Billion x per second). EHS people can feel some of this energy, can they “see” it- I don’t know. { "lightbox\_close": "Close", "lightbox\_next": "Next", "lightbox\_previous": "Previous", "lightbox\_error": "The requested content cannot be loaded. # Thread: Information about grounding my laptop - grounding cord
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/information-about-grounding-my-laptop-grounding-cord.28697/>
**Subforum:** The EMF Rx
**Posts:** 3
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### KinaBibiDiop — 2024-03-19T18:40:05+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/information-about-grounding-my-laptop-grounding-cord.28697/post-332669>

hello hello

I am looking into grounding my laptop but there is something I do not understand:

does the plug of the gronding cord necessarily have to be a 3-prong plug or can it be any type of plug (depending on the types of plugs available in my country) that goes into a wall socket?

### Anthony Smith — 2024-03-19T19:07:24+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/information-about-grounding-my-laptop-grounding-cord.28697/post-332671>

For your laptop, or any device, to be grounded while charging, it must be connected to a ground! No need if you use it on battery. You must have a 3 prong plug - the third prong IS the ground OR you can add an external ground cord and attach it to the body of the computer (device) IF it is metal. You can get ground cords that use a USB plug to ground.

### KinaBibiDiop — 2024-03-19T21:34:57+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/information-about-grounding-my-laptop-grounding-cord.28697/post-332681>

ok, so when it's not charging there's no use grounding it. If I want to use my laptop while it's charging them it's important to ground it...I did not know that, thanks

and a 3 prong plug is necessary. But what if my socket does not support the 3 prong plug?


══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Hi, All! I've already done some of the smaller changes specified in The Leptin Rx, but it's time to take a deeper dive into the actual meals/no snacks/no grains/no processed sugars part. Big habit change for me, but I'm ready. I've told my husband I've followed Dr. Kruse and am reading his content with my usual amount of skepticism (which is a lot whenever I read any health info, since having seen the centralized medicine machine firsthand the last 21 years) and I am cautiously optimistic (and excited), as I cannot see a single thing in Dr. Kruse's content that doesn't make total sense. I wonder if I should start a journal on the forum, I'm kind of nervous to do it. . .not sure. Open to advice, feedback. Glad and appreciative to have found this.

# Thread: TN First state to fight back against chem trails
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/tn-first-state-to-fight-back-against-chem-trails.28704/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 11
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### DLO — 2024-03-21T19:45:37+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/tn-first-state-to-fight-back-against-chem-trails.28704/post-332734>

**Legislators in the great State of Tennessee this week passed a bill seeking to ban the spraying of chemicals into the atmosphere, a government weather manipulation technique known as “geo-engineering**.**“**

On Monday, the state Senate passed [SB2 691/HB 2063](https://wapp.capitol.tn.gov/apps/BillInfo/Default.aspx?BillNumber=HB2063), which seeks to “prohibit the intentional injection, release, or dispersion, by any means, of chemicals, chemical compounds, substances, or apparatus within the borders of this state into the atmosphere with the express purpose of affecting temperature, weather, or the intensity of the sunlight.”

### Alexandra — 2024-03-21T19:46:24+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/tn-first-state-to-fight-back-against-chem-trails.28704/post-332735>

I loved seeing this on X. Made my day. I almost tagged our governor and said "where you at - make this happen!"

### Saichi — 2024-03-21T19:49:40+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/tn-first-state-to-fight-back-against-chem-trails.28704/post-332736>

PR appeasement nothing more.

### DLO — 2024-03-21T20:24:46+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/tn-first-state-to-fight-back-against-chem-trails.28704/post-332742>

TN not allowing cbdc's is also a +1 so all they need is one more big win in my book

### doctorwu85 — 2024-03-21T20:43:48+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/tn-first-state-to-fight-back-against-chem-trails.28704/post-332744>

New Hampshire has introduced a similar bill, though I'm not sure when they're voting on it.

[https://www.gencourt.state.nh.us/bill\_status/pdf.aspx?id=23323&q=billVersion](https://www.gencourt.state.nh.us/bill_status/pdf.aspx?id=23323&q=billVersion)

### DLO — 2024-04-04T01:54:32+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/tn-first-state-to-fight-back-against-chem-trails.28704/post-333198>

Another TN win
The bill opposing mRNA in food was passed by the Tennessee legislature and awaits the governor’s signature. The bill comes in response to a University of California-Riverside research project looking into whether mRNA which targets pathogens could be implanted into edible plants, which would then be consumed. Local media described the bill as a move targeting “vaccine lettuce,” would classify foods modified to act as vaccines, as pharmaceuticals that essentially require a prescription.

UC Riverside associate professor of Botany and Plant Sciences, Juan Pablo, said “We are testing this approach with spinach and lettuce and have long-term goals of people growing it in their own gardens,” adding “Farmers could also eventually grow entire fields of it.” Another researcher, Nicole Steinmetz, said in the same release that they planned to use nanoparticles or “plant viruses, for gene delivery to plants.” A Kentucky company has already been “infecting growing tobacco plants with a genetically modified coronavirus” to see if it can produce antibodies for a potential vaccine, adding that the company “can already do this right now.” US Representative Thomas Massie sounded the alarm against manipulating food.

### Mr.AJ — 2025-03-03T17:42:10+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/tn-first-state-to-fight-back-against-chem-trails.28704/post-347799>

Ya it's still happening, sadly I emailed my state rep and they basically said airspace control is up to the feds and it's not under the jurisdiction of the state legislature. The bill they pass just prohibits permits being issued to people who want to geo engineer. Either something must be done at the federal level, or the state of TN needs to take control of their airspace back.

### DLO — 2025-03-03T19:17:58+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/tn-first-state-to-fight-back-against-chem-trails.28704/post-347809>

# Thread: When in Vegas…
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/when-in-vegas%E2%80%A6.28736/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 1
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### NikkiYork — 2024-03-31T11:56:52+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/when-in-vegas%E2%80%A6.28736/post-333040>

I’m in Vegas for the first time after becoming light sensitive. As in waking up for sunrise and not exposing yourself to artificial light after dark.

And I have to say, it’s a trip. Everything becomes different.
People seem so sick. It starts hurting. It starts revolting inside. It’s so beautiful to witness and at the same time it’s painful, because: where do we go from here?
Do I have to leave it all behind?
Who is with me? Like nobody?

I’m not going deeper into this, you know what I mean. Or not.

You can probably only relate, if you were out there like I was.

I have to thank Jack for the science and saving so many!!!! Thank you!

# Thread: Informed Consent
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/informed-consent.28739/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 1
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### DLO — 2024-04-01T05:24:24+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/informed-consent.28739/post-333086>

Hopefully it's just an April fools joke.
**In a significant blow to patient autonomy, informed consent has been quietly revoked just 77 years after it was codified in the Nuremberg Code.**

On the 21st of December 2023, as we were frantically preparing for the festive season, the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) and the Food and Drug Administration (FDA) issued a [final ruling to amend a provision](https://www.federalregister.gov/documents/2023/12/21/2023-27935/institutional-review-board-waiver-or-alteration-of-informed-consent-for-minimal-risk-clinical) of the [21st Century Cures Act](https://www.congress.gov/114/bills/hr34/BILLS-114hr34enr.pdf). This allowed..

> _…an_ **_exception from the requirement to obtain informed consent_** _when a clinical investigation poses no more than a minimal risk to the human subject…_

This ruling went into effect on January 22nd, 2024, which means it’s already standard practice across America.
So, what is the 21st Century Cures Act? It is a controversial Law enacted by the 114th United States Congress in January 2016 with strong support from the [pharmaceutical industry](https://fortune.com/2016/12/07/congress-passes-21st-century-cures/). The Act was designed to

> …accelerate the discovery, development, and delivery of 21st-century cures, **_and for other purposes \[?\]…_**\[emphasis added\]

Some of the provisions within this Act make for uncomfortable reading. For example, the Act supported:

_High-risk, high-reward research \[Sec. 2036\].

Novel clinical trial designs \[Sec. 3021\]

Encouraging vaccine innovation \[Sec. 3093\]._

This Act granted the National Institutes of Health (NIH) legal protection to pursue high-risk, novel vaccine research. A strong case could be made that these provisions capture all the necessary architecture required for much of the evil that transpired over the past four years.

Overturning patient-informed consent was another stated goal of the original Act. Buried under Section 3024 was the provision to develop an

> **_Informed consent waiver_** _or alteration for clinical investigation._

Scholars of medical history understand that the concept of informed consent, something we all take for granted today, is a relatively new phenomenon codified in its modern understanding as one of the critical principles of the [Nuremberg Code in 1947](https://www.encyclopedia.com/science/medical-magazines/nuremberg-code-establishes-principle-informed-consent). It is inconceivable that just 77 years after Nuremberg, the door has once again opened for state-sanctioned medical experimentation on potentially uninformed and unwilling citizens.

> …accelerate the discovery, development, and delivery of 21st-century cures, **_and for other purposes \[?\]…_**\[emphasis added\]

Some of the provisions within this Act make for uncomfortable reading. For example, the Act supported:

_High-risk, high-reward research \[Sec. 2036\].

Novel clinical trial designs \[Sec. 3021\]

Encouraging vaccine innovation \[Sec. 3093\]._

This Act granted the National Institutes of Health (NIH) legal protection to pursue high-risk, novel vaccine research. A strong case could be made that these provisions capture all the necessary architecture required for much of the evil that transpired over the past four years.

Overturning patient-informed consent was another stated goal of the original Act. Buried under Section 3024 was the provision to develop an

> **_Informed consent waiver_** _or alteration for clinical investigation._

Scholars of medical history understand that the concept of informed consent, something we all take for granted today, is a relatively new phenomenon codified in its modern understanding as one of the critical principles of the [Nuremberg Code in 1947](https://www.encyclopedia.com/science/medical-magazines/nuremberg-code-establishes-principle-informed-consent). It is inconceivable that just 77 years after Nuremberg, the door has once again opened for state-sanctioned medical experimentation on potentially uninformed and unwilling citizens.

According to this amendment, the state alone, acting through the NIH, the FDA, and the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC), will decide what is considered a _“minimal risk”_ and, most concerning, will determine:

> **…appropriate safeguards to protect the rights, safety, and welfare of human subjects.**

**Notice the term _subjects_, not patients, persons, individuals, or citizens…but _subjects_. In asymmetrical power relationships such as clinician/patient, it is understood that the passive _subject_ will comply with the rulings and mandates of their medical masters. The use of the term _subjects_ also serves to dehumanise. The dehumanisation of populations was a critical component of Nazi human experimentation and, as [Hannah Arendt argued](https://www.google.com.au/books/edition/The_Origins_of_Totalitarianism/UqqqtAEACAAJ?hl=en), is an essential step toward denying citizens _“…the right to have rights.”_**
This ruling also allows researchers and their misguided evangelical billionaire backers to potentially pursue dangerous experimental programs such as Bill Gates’ [mosquito vaccines](https://www.npr.org/sections/goatsandsoda/2022/09/21/1112727841/a-box-of-200-mosquitoes-did-the-vaccinating-in-this-malaria-trial-thats-not-a-jo), [mRNA vaccines](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC8211312/) [in livestock](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC7332557/), and vaccines in [aerosols](https://insight.jci.org/articles/view/155655). This Act encourages these novel and high-risk programs, with medical studies approved as _‘minimal risk’_ by the regulators no longer requiring researchers and pharmaceutical companies to obtain patient consent. Yet, the histories of pharmacology and medicine are plagued with clinical investigations and interventions that were thought to pose no more than minimal risk to humans but went on to cause immeasurable pain, suffering, and death.

This amendment represents merely a first tentative step as the US government _tests the waters_ to see what it can get away with. Given the lack of attention this ruling received in both the corporate press and independent media, the government is likely to feel emboldened to widen its scope. Thus, this decision represents the beginning of a chilling revisionism in Western medical history, as patient autonomy is again forsaken.

This ruling, to be actioned by potentially corrupt scientists, health bureaucrats, and captured health and drug regulators, is another step toward a dystopian future unimaginable just five years ago. No doubt the infrastructure to implement this decree is already being constructed by the same _groupthink cultists_ responsible for the nightmarish pandemic lockdowns, continuing to place the pursuit of profit and _the greater good_ above individual choice, bodily autonomy, and informed consent.

i began taking the following supplements ~6 months after i was diagnosed with ALS in june of 2020. at that point i was declining very rapidly, but these supplements quickly stopped my progression and I eventually noticed slight improvements. by no means am I saying that this is a cure, but I can say with 99% confidence that these have bought me more time to spend with my kids.

# Thread: Coconut oil and other primitive cosmetics
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/coconut-oil-and-other-primitive-cosmetics.28762/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 5
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### NikkiYork — 2024-04-06T19:42:32+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/coconut-oil-and-other-primitive-cosmetics.28762/post-333315>

I am pretty much with Jack when it comes to no cosmetic is the best cosmetic. But: we did get out of the cave at some point, so smelling nicely is a plus and our environment is not clean enough to no longer have to wash. Beauty is important for …essentially getting laid, literally or figuratively.

Also n=1 and some people have more issues than others.

I cut a nature boy’s hair yesterday, great guy, but he doesn’t listen to the Nikki. So he‘ll have to keep having issues.

He puts a ton of coconut oil in his hair, because it’s natural and he only does natural things, shaman style - traveling all the cool countries and looking great, but ew, the skin falls in large scales off of his head. He doesn’t really care, but not very pretty.

Firstly, who are we kidding, there is no spigot on a palm tree to fill up a bottle of coconut oil. It comes from nature, yes, but it is processed and as cheap as some oils are, I doubt the quality is great.
To be a bit provocative, petroleum comes from nature as well, and petroleum chemicals can actually be pretty awesome. It all depends.

Secondly, coconut oil is highly comedogenic, meaning it clogs pores. Well, that’s what is good for keeping moisture inside whatever it clogs. That’s why it’s great for some people. Not for all and not for nature boy, his skin is trying to get rid of that stuff so hard. But people tell him: if your scalp is scaly it lacks moisture (true), that means more coconut oil (only sometimes true).

Anyways, case made.

Silicones for hair have a really bad rep, because there are brands who use shit ingredients. Light silicones are in fact great for moisturizing and it depends on the brand specifically and on you - to stick with that example.

Just like you can’t say beef is bad, because Jack in the box gives you a heart burn.

As much as we are living in shit times where large companies are making big money fooling people - true not only for medicine, we also live in great times where single people with virtually no capital can come up with great ideas and products. And they do.

The issue is lack of knowledge to find the good stuff and stupid people falling for the tricksters all the time.
And because the level of frustration is so high, we now have people smashing avocadoes in their hair and eggs and bleach it with baking soda and lemon juice… primitive cosmetics.

I guess it can be romantic to pick an avocado off a tree, rub it in your hair and believe it never felt better. It also shows creativity and self reliance but:

Not all of this is great, see coconut oil cloggage. We did come further as humans and we can do better. We don’t need to toss everything we progressed with.

Sadly the small companies with the great products almost always get bought by the big ones and then the ingredients and formulas are changed. And we keep buying the formerly good stuff until we realize it’s no longer good and we need to find a new product.

For everybody who wants to try the diy primitive cosmetics:
1) wash or better soak your hair with beer and see what happens.
2) pick rosemary somewhere and make a tea and rinse with it.
3) try apple cider vinegar rinse, dilute that with water

None of this is harmful and depending on where you are at, it can be great for your hair. Emphasis is on “see what happens”. If your hair gets dull or frizzy, don’t do it again. It wasn’t the right thing to do.

There is a lot more you can try - and I do have a knack for it, but I did want to let you know: all of this is also chemistry and not all is the right thing to do, “less is more”, “don’t take it, if you can make it”, counts here as well.

### thejessallen — 2024-07-31T17:53:07+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/coconut-oil-and-other-primitive-cosmetics.28762/post-337879>

What do you wash your hair with? Great insights. Thank you!

### Mat.I — 2024-08-01T04:06:21+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/coconut-oil-and-other-primitive-cosmetics.28762/post-337902>

You could use egg yolks to wash your hair (in colder water though so you don't end up with scrambled eggs)..

For whole body including hair moisturiser/oil - we make whipped beef tallow balm. About 1 heaped cup grass fed beef tallow melted slowly, when off the stove add 1/4 cup olive oil, let it cool naturally or speed it up in the fridge or freezer, just before setting whip it with an electric mixer. We make large batches and store in glass amber jars with metal lids. There is no beef smell if the tallow you bought was rendered/filtered well. The kids love it and we use it all over the body. Great for lips too. Play around with the ratios and do what works best for you. Some people add essential oils, however we keep it all natural. We have been doing this for about 3 years now.

### Mat.I — 2024-08-01T04:08:58+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/coconut-oil-and-other-primitive-cosmetics.28762/post-337903>

> [Mat.I said:](/goto/post?id=337902)
>
> You could use egg yolks to wash your hair (in colder water though so you don't end up with scrambled eggs)..
>
> For whole body including hair moisturiser/oil - we make whipped beef tallow balm. About 1 heaped cup grass fed beef tallow melted slowly, when off the stove add 1/4 cup olive oil, let it cool naturally or speed it up in the fridge or freezer, just before setting whip it with an electric mixer. We make large batches and store in glass amber jars with metal lids. There is no beef smell if the tallow you bought was rendered/filtered well. The kids love it and we use it all over the body. Great for lips too. Play around with the ratios and do what works best for you. Some people add essential oils, however we keep it all natural. We have been doing this for about 3 years now.

Also, we have never had issues with clogged pores. It absorbs very well and does not sit separate (oily).

### Pratima — 2024-08-01T06:29:32+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/coconut-oil-and-other-primitive-cosmetics.28762/post-337909>

> [thejessallen said:](/goto/post?id=337879)
>
> What do you wash your hair with? Great insights. Thank you!

I used to put myself in the oily hair category.....and shampooed with various brands all for "oily"......Several years ago I read on the daily mail about some red head who reduced shampooing frequency and eventually stopped shampooing altogether and insisted that brushing her hair with a genuine boar bristle brush that distributed the oil in her hair was all that was needed.

So anyway, probably for no other reason than I was just sick of my hair......I tried it and stuck with it. I have not shampooed my hair since Sept 2018, and when I feel it getting a bit heavy I do a leave-in thing with 1:1 ratio of ACV and water. I detangle my hair before I shower, and never comb or brush afterwards.

# Thread: Does grass-fed meat taste different?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/does-grass-fed-meat-taste-different.28768/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 9
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### BrunoB — 2024-04-08T03:24:36+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/does-grass-fed-meat-taste-different.28768/post-333378>

Hello, good morning, I have bought meat that says it is grass-fed.but I feel the same flavor, texture, color, they have scammed? thanks

### doctorwu85 — 2024-04-08T03:44:33+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/does-grass-fed-meat-taste-different.28768/post-333380>

I haven't eaten grain-fed meat regularly in a while, but in my experience the meat tastes similar but the fat tastes different. What cut did you get? If it's a fatty cut like ribeye, I would imagine you can detect a difference since there is more fat throughout the cut.

Grain-fed fat tastes more buttery to me, while grass-fed fat tastes a little more gamey. They are both good. I would have to admit that grain-fed tastes better to me, but I almost never buy it due to the fat profile, presence of antibiotics, quesitonable sourcing, etc.

### Mat.I — 2024-04-08T04:22:28+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/does-grass-fed-meat-taste-different.28768/post-333385>

> [BrunoB said:](/goto/post?id=333378)
>
> Hello, good morning, I have bought meat that says it is grass-fed.but I feel the same flavor, texture, color, they have scammed? thanks

I'm sure google could give some photo examples on grass fed vs grain. However from personal experience, you would be able to tell the difference when purchasing the meat due to the amount of intramuscular fat (aka marbling) (more in grain fed) you will also generally notice a very slight yellow hue to fat (from the beta-carotene) and darker meat as opposed to fully grain fed or finished with whiter fat and lighter (say pink flesh). I have had a few debates with butchers in the past who have advertised grass fed/finished when it was evident that supplemental feed was used based on what I was seeing..

### Saichi — 2024-04-08T06:11:31+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/does-grass-fed-meat-taste-different.28768/post-333389>

Best to buy meat only from farmers directly or from butchers who only work with 100 grass.

### JanSz — 2024-04-08T15:37:33+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/does-grass-fed-meat-taste-different.28768/post-333395>

> [BrunoB said:](/goto/post?id=333378)
>
> Hello, good morning, I have bought meat that says it is grass-fed.but I feel the same flavor, texture, color, they have scammed? thanks

In 1979 -1980 I was in Brazil, building Nuclear Power Plant in Itaorna.
There were number of self-served restaurants on the work site.
Mounds of large steaks.
I had much better teeth then.
Without a (sharp) knife there was no way to eat them.
And only very little pieces.
No grain of fat, just hard meat.
I was wondering why they did not serve that beef grounded.

Shrimps looked unusual to me.
They were complete and large. The whole animal, not just a tail.
.
Another words, if you see fat on the steak, --->> think twice of what you have on your plate.
..
On the other hand, cows have double stomachs, ruminants.
Ruminants have the least amounts of Linoleic Acids comparing to other creatures we eat.
LA is fat. So, if no fat then less LA.
..

### JoeBranca — 2024-04-08T17:59:39+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/does-grass-fed-meat-taste-different.28768/post-333404>

The big difference with the actual meat is going to come from a few factors, like breed of cattle. Maybe the biggest factor is whether dry aging process was used. Dry aging is no longer an industry standard, but if you can find a butcher that dry ages the carcass, that intensifies the flavor and tenderizes the meat. This also raises the price of the meat, due to both storage cost and loss of weight (maybe 5%-7% weight gone from evaporation but the farms get paid on initial carcass weight).

### BrunoB — 2024-06-02T23:54:10+0300

what I need is meat that is as fresh as possible, otherwise my health will suffer greatly.

### JanSz — 2024-06-03T00:57:49+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/does-grass-fed-meat-taste-different.28768/post-335396>

> [BrunoB said:](/goto/post?id=335392)

# Thread: Transformer on property outside of bedroom
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/transformer-on-property-outside-of-bedroom.28769/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 16
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Mishamasha — 2024-04-08T15:08:15+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/transformer-on-property-outside-of-bedroom.28769/post-333393>

Got this transformer outside my window. does anyone know about these? Not very excited about it. It’s directly below my bedroom. Also know that probably grounding anywhere near the house might be an issue. I have a 12 year old trifield meter. Saving up for a better rf meter.
{ "lightbox\_close": "Close", "lightbox\_next": "Next", "lightbox\_previous": "Previous", "lightbox\_error": "The requested content cannot be loaded. Please try again later.", "lightbox\_start\_slideshow": "Start slideshow", "lightbox\_stop\_slideshow": "Stop slideshow", "lightbox\_full\_screen": "Full screen", "lightbox\_thumbnails": "Thumbnails", "lightbox\_download": "Download", "lightbox\_share": "Share", "lightbox\_zoom": "Zoom", "lightbox\_new\_window": "New window", "lightbox\_toggle\_sidebar": "Toggle sidebar" } [](https://forum.jackkruse.com/attachments/img_3035-jpeg.27653/)

### Anthony Smith — 2024-04-08T20:09:48+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/transformer-on-property-outside-of-bedroom.28769/post-333412>

I get no electric field off the one on our business property and little to no magnetic field unless within 3 feet. If yours is like the one I tested, stay 3 feet away from it and you’ll be ok. The transformer obviously connects to the mains supply and to your house service panel. Figure out where those wires are buried and if you stay 10 feet away I expect you will be fine grounding. There is no RF from a transformer Or the underground wires.

### Anthony Smith — 2024-04-08T21:00:13+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/transformer-on-property-outside-of-bedroom.28769/post-333421>

By the way, the gauss meter on the TriField TF2 is an ok meter, but not so good with RF. We at EMFSafe believe the body voltage method is the best way to measure electric fields because it shows what is going on in/thru you - [www.LiveEMFSafe.com/kruse](http://www.LiveEMFSafe.com/kruse)

### Mishamasha — 2024-04-10T16:57:19+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/transformer-on-property-outside-of-bedroom.28769/post-333475>

Sorry, there was a misunderstanding! I said ”no rf”
so no radio frequency reading came up within 5 feet of the transformer!
sorry Saichi, i thought you were asking the range of measurement on the trifield meter.
.1- 1.0 mW/cm(squared) is the full range of measurement on this gadget , only time ive seen this peak is by wifi router

### Saichi — 2024-04-10T20:51:51+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/transformer-on-property-outside-of-bedroom.28769/post-333486>

> [Mishamasha said:](/goto/post?id=333475)
>
> Sorry, there was a misunderstanding! I said ”no rf”
> so no radio frequency reading came up within 5 feet of the transformer!
> sorry Saichi, i thought you were asking the range of measurement on the trifield meter.
> .1- 1.0 mW/cm(squared) is the full range of measurement on this gadget , only time ive seen this peak is by wifi router

Trifield measures up to 20 mW not 1 mW and that's m^2 not cm^2. It also has a sampling rate that captures little of RF.

It's impossible to know what your real background levels are with a Trifield. Even SLT's green meter can't measure lot of the new 5G midband.

# Thread: Help with healthy drinking water

### MattV — 2024-04-20T19:04:39+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/help-with-healthy-drinking-water.28805/post-333827>

I live in a house on municipal water supply (no well), I currently have a whole house carbon filtration system.
I am considering adding a RO system to remove as much Fluoride as possible.
Does anyone have other recommendations to improve my water quality?
Also, how should I treat my water after filtration? Remineralize, copper pot and let sit on my magnetic mattress?
Thank you.
Matt

 www.waterdrop.com

and it's recommended Filter system

 www.waterdrop.de

for the last 3 months and it has definitely made a difference.

Highly recommendable!

**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/help-with-healthy-drinking-water.28805/post-338400>

I live in Pennsylvania and use a Clearly Filtered water pitcher. We fill it with tap water, and the filter removes 99% fluoride plus other harmful contaminants. We change the filter every 3 months.

### Saichi — 2024-07-28T05:09:14+0300

Finally a welcome revelation. For the past week in Brooklyn I've only been charging my MacBook Air in a separate room and my Bristol has been excellent the whole time, first time since October of last year. My charger despite functioning 'normally' must've been damaged internally causing it to release immense levels of EMI, probably from dropping it on the floor over time. I remember the charger also started introducing a high pitch noise in my external speakers October of last year. Ironically I attributed my destroyed Bristol to the new microwave levels implemented during FEMA test which also occurred in the same month.

I purchased a new charger today for my laptop and the audible EMI doesn't extend past a few feet now.

A portable AM radio is a must for everyone here along with the rf, e, m, and in-line DE meters. Amazing an Apple charger destroyed my Bristol and not current NYC.

### Anthony Smith — 2024-07-30T21:20:14+0300

**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/bristol-chart.28818/post-337807>

I have found metal tables can be grounded to significantly reduce the field. Some two prong lamp can be grounded IF there is metal to be attached to. I use a ground cord with alligator clip to test then attach something more permanently if it works. Measure with a BV meter to confirm.

### Saichi — 2024-07-31T01:36:57+0300

I grounded my large stainless steel table couple years ago with this:

### [The NCB Plug Dirty Electricity Filter for Grounding from SYB – Shield Your Body](https://shop.shieldyourbody.com/products/the-ncb-from-syb)

The NCB Plug Makes it Safer to Ground Your Body to an Outlet. Ground your body more safely with the NCB Plug. Great for use with grounding mats, grounding sheets, EMF canopies– & more! Powerful protection for your grounding port✔️ Restricts ground current EMF✔️ Reduces dirty electricity EMF✔️...

 shop.shieldyourbody.com

My Gigahertz meter showed voltage dropped from 70 to 3.

I have a vintage metal floor lamp I'll test grounding with an alligator.

### Anthony Smith — 2024-07-31T01:49:28+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/bristol-chart.28818/post-337814>

I like SYB we carry their canopies. That is a $300 gizmo!
All you need to do to ground something is to ground it:
Set up BV meter with its ground cord connected. Hold the BV meter in one hand and touch something with your other hand. . . If BV goes up - it is NOT grounded . . . Connect a ground cord to the thing you are testing - touch it again - If BV then goes down (often to zero) it IS now grounded.

### Anthony Smith — 2024-07-31T02:21:07+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/bristol-chart.28818/post-337818>

We do not recommend grounding your body (and being part of the circuit with a 60Hz AC field flowing through you) but the devices were the field is coming from. Do you know the NCB is not for grounding devices ONLY your body? From their product page:

-   Note: You only want to use the NCB Plug on grounding products for your body (like grounding mats and grounding sheets and EMF shielding canopies) but not for your actual appliances (like your refrigerator or electric stove).

Someone can sit at their desk with a 60Hz AC field of 2,000 mV - 3,000 mV or ground everything and get it down significantly by using simple ground cords. Ground the devices (the source) NOT you.

# Thread: Grounding and Seafood in Australia
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/grounding-and-seafood-in-australia.28823/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 4
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Ben Trussell — 2024-04-28T10:19:09+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/grounding-and-seafood-in-australia.28823/post-334035>

Hello, I was wondering - (perhaps for Australian readers and ex pat Australians) as Im new here and picking up a new rock every day with something to learn. (Thank you) ..Jack mentions in the recent POW WOW April, Grounding in Australia is no good, due to it being a dessert. Are we getting any benefit from grounding - ? What can we do to mitigate this ? Unfortunately some of the punch in the head intel from Jack is disheartening (but very appreciated thank you) from an Australian perspective - Jack also mentioned the fish here is sub par - mostly farmed , and best bet is Oysters that are great for DHA. I can say here in South Australia we have great wild caught Herring, Cod, and Mullet from river systems that mix with the sea, (The Coorong, River Murray ) , Western Australian scallops, scallops from the sea bed here in South Australia and so on - so hoping that positive intel for our own marine life can have a similar good news story attached to our ability to ground

### [Coorong National Park](https://www.parks.sa.gov.au/parks/coorong-national-park)

About See and do Safety Maps Fees

 www.parks.sa.gov.au

### [Coorong Wild Seafood | Meningie, South Australia](https://www.coorongwildseafood.com.au/)

Coorong Wild Seafood is a fishing and processing business in Meningie, South Australia. Purchase fresh seafood, visit our seafood cellar door or go on a tour.

 www.coorongwildseafood.com.au

Cheers
Ben

### Brent Patrick — 2024-04-29T05:23:16+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/grounding-and-seafood-in-australia.28823/post-334076>

The area I live is surrounded by trees, shrubs and foliage .mind you I sleep on a 20 Gauss magnetico but even before that I was a decent sleeper.
As Aussies we are renowned for not wearing shoes, however due to multiculturalism and the need to spit on the ground I wear shoes when I am out .I have leather sole shoes but to be honest I don't wear them as much ,as I ground at home.
My intuition tells me I am on the right path as I have high energy levels, can pretty much eat anything without concern of weight gain and sleep deep.

I would be smashing that wild Herring.

My Aunty is 95 sharp as a tack she has Sun worshipped her whole life deeply tanned ,she lives in Coffs Harbour NSW 100 metres from the beach.
Her younger sister my Aunty is 87 her Husband my Uncle he is 94 and still mows his own lawn both in good health they live in inland Orange NSW My Aunty never gets the Sun always covered up due to the cold weather in Orange.

You be the judge!

### [Do plants feel Earth's magnetic field? › News in Science (ABC Science)](https://www.abc.net.au/science/articles/2014/01/24/3931083.htm)

Italian researchers have identified a possible mechanism by which plants might react to the Earth's magnetic field.

 www.abc.net.au

### Jillian Ogle — 2024-04-29T05:32:57+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/grounding-and-seafood-in-australia.28823/post-334077>

I'm unsure as to why he says that. Idk about you but it rains more than 25 centimetres in one day sometimes, let alone a year. As for the fish, i love my wild caught barramundi. I wonder if he's ever been to Aus? lol

**A place that receives less than 10 inches (25 centimeters) of rain per year** is considered a desert.

### Brent Patrick — 2024-04-29T06:07:13+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/grounding-and-seafood-in-australia.28823/post-334078>

Light-water-magnetism and a bucket load of barramundi

"Previous research has shown that many species of fish, as well as [migratory birds](http://news.sciencemag.org/sciencenow/2012/04/global-pigeoning-system.html?ref=hp), have the ability to detect differences in magnetic field strengths, which vary around the globe. Scientists think that the key to this ability is magnetite, the most magnetic of all minerals, which they've found embedded in bird and fish tissues."

### [Magnetic Cells Give Sense of Direction to Fish](https://www.wired.com/2012/07/fish-magnetic-navigation/)

Scientists have isolated magnetic cells in the fish that respond to Earth's geomagnetic fields. The advance may help researchers get to the root of magnetic sensing in a variety of creatures, including birds.

 www.wired.com

# Thread: Who can I turn to with hyper-memory or how can I figure this out?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/who-can-i-turn-to-with-hyper-memory-or-how-can-i-figure-this-out.28826/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 4
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### NikkiYork — 2024-04-28T16:23:38+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/who-can-i-turn-to-with-hyper-memory-or-how-can-i-figure-this-out.28826/post-334041>

I was thinking since this is also a brain forum, maybe somebody has ideas or experiences or even knowledge.

I remember everything. Well, not really, but my memory is unreal and people don’t believe me.
I can remember learning to talk and learning to walk. I have clear memories of age probably 0. Or 1 years old. I also have odd early memories that look different from your classical memory.

We moved shortly before I turned two years so gladly I have proof that I was younger than that with all memories I have from my first house.

I do actually claim that I remember being born, but since it is officially impossible, I’m just some sort of freak who believes it. It’s a very scattered memorie and mostly consists of cold, bright and tile. And humans. It is not a real picture memory.

A very dominant memory is that of falling asleep pre-speech. And I see everything mirrored in my room. At least that’s what my mom tells me. I see that room now. When it turned dark, things started to move in front of my eyes. My mom had put a snake like object on the window sill to protect me from the draft. That snake moved and it scared the shit out of me every night. Horrid!!!

I tried to tell her. I tried to point. I remember that so clearly. And I could not make her understand. I learned talking very early

I remember nursing and my Mom said it’s impossible because she only nursed for 3 months.

Oh well there you go. I’m making it up, but I actually have many proofs that I am not making it up for things that I could not have known. There were not many photos taken back in the day. I do t want to bore you, but I have those.

Anyways. This is a riddle of my life and of consciousness and how it works. We have the internet now and I can impossibly be the only person who claims this type of memory. Maybe we can shed some light onto it here.

Maybe somebody can explain to me why or how it is impossible and then I can go from there?

I don’t have photographic memory. My grandfather had that. He could tell you the number of the page of a book that a specific sentence was written on. I don’t have that. He could recite poems like no other.

My sister remembers long numbers because she sees them as colors and she just reads the color combination in her mind. She is a walking phone book. I don’t have that either.

If you don’t have an answer, but a good story. I like to hear it

### DLO — 2024-04-30T01:38:08+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/who-can-i-turn-to-with-hyper-memory-or-how-can-i-figure-this-out.28826/post-334110>

Wake me when you can show up to med school empty handed and pass everything at top of class like Jack. Now thats memory.

### NikkiYork — 2024-04-30T04:14:54+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/who-can-i-turn-to-with-hyper-memory-or-how-can-i-figure-this-out.28826/post-334118>

> [DLO said:](/goto/post?id=334110)
>
> Wake me when you can show up to med school empty handed and pass everything at top of class like Jack. Now thats memory.

Nah man, please keep sleeping

### Anthony Smith — 2024-04-30T06:22:36+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/who-can-i-turn-to-with-hyper-memory-or-how-can-i-figure-this-out.28826/post-334131>

Life is not a completion with others . . . but with yourself . . . and who you are meant to be VS what other people would have you be.

# Thread: Fluctuating magnetic field in kitchen?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/fluctuating-magnetic-field-in-kitchen.28843/>
**Subforum:** The EMF Rx
**Posts:** 6
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Niki Stanton — 2024-05-03T00:32:20+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/fluctuating-magnetic-field-in-kitchen.28843/post-334230>

I kept feeling like garbage every time I was in the kitchen doing food prep. I thought it was just energy tank at the end of the day but it kept being so dramatic a shift in my body that today I took out the trifield.

Hopefully the photos below posts- it’s me standing in front of the stove and the magnetic field fluctuating between about 0.5 to 5.0 and it was cycling back and forth between those two numbers. About every 5-10 seconds.

What is this about?
It’s good to have validation I guess but I kinda need to cook for the family without feeling terrible. Hmm.

### Niki Stanton — 2024-05-03T00:35:00+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/fluctuating-magnetic-field-in-kitchen.28843/post-334231>

I feel a little dumb. It’s the burner kicking on and off right? Is that just the nature of all ovens or do I have a special one.

### Anthony Smith — 2024-05-03T07:53:27+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/fluctuating-magnetic-field-in-kitchen.28843/post-334241>

Have an electrician check the wiring because as far as I know that should not happen.

### Joseph LeBlanc — 2024-05-03T15:09:49+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/fluctuating-magnetic-field-in-kitchen.28843/post-334248>

If the burner did not kick on and off, the oven would not maintain a set temperature

Feedback loops signal the burner to turn off and on to keep the T inside steady

### Niki Stanton — 2024-05-03T16:07:44+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/fluctuating-magnetic-field-in-kitchen.28843/post-334249>

> [Joseph LeBlanc said:](/goto/post?id=334248)
>
> If the burner did not kick on and off, the oven would not maintain a set temperature
>
> Feedback loops signal the burner to turn off and on to keep the T inside steady

Guess I thought it would be grounded to not put out a high electric and magnetic field when it cycles.

### Saichi — 2024-05-04T15:29:41+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/fluctuating-magnetic-field-in-kitchen.28843/post-334263>

> [Niki Stanton said:](/goto/post?id=334249)
>
> Guess I thought it would be grounded to not put out a high electric and magnetic field when it cycles.

It is grounded. All grounded electric appliances put out high fields when cycling. Gas stoves don't though.

# Thread: Prayer request for Wisdom and Grace re pancreatic cancer Dx
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/prayer-request-for-wisdom-and-grace-re-pancreatic-cancer-dx.28846/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 9
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Martha Ray — 2024-05-04T16:53:27+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/prayer-request-for-wisdom-and-grace-re-pancreatic-cancer-dx.28846/post-334264>

The month of March my husband developed left abdominal pain radiating around his body an pain that came and went with waves being more intense pain. So far he has chosen care care at two major Virginia hospitals . He had 1st CT scan that revealed 4 cm mass on his pancreas 1 MRI about 12 days later that said WWO contrast that showed 5.5 cm mass on his pancreases another upper body CT wo contrast checking for any spread. On Friday late day 4 26 24 had a endoscopic ultrasound with biopsy of pancreas and we not given paperwork recap when we left the procedure but this biopsy showed up in his “My Chart”.
Went back to emergency department and was admitted to the hospital this past week after pain meds not working and Told stage 1 or 2 cancer on May 3th.

I am in shock trying to adjust to a very strong and able bodied 86 year old becoming so weak and suffering so much pain so quickly. Both my husband and I are Grace Oriented believers in the Lord Jesus Christ and trusting God for his best direction. I am hoping for the best but preparing for the worst. I love and am devoted to my husband but this is long suffering for me as it does not align with my own journey recovering cancer and cancer treatment over the past 15 years.

After visiting my husband in the hospital the last few days in the hospital I personally am very weak physically, emotionally and mentally.
Spiritually claiming : Hebrews 4:16 **Let us therefore come boldly to the throne of grace, that we may obtain mercy and find grace to help in time of need.

Two things Right now

FIRST,** I do not know how to fully interpret the report below especially. **"FINAL DIAGNOSIS COMMENT
[View trends](https://mychart.healthsystem.virginia.edu/Mychart/app/test-results/past-result-details?ecomponentid=WP-24AV1e1Yu-2FixWHf5ku4fet6Q-3D-3D-24aMGYcpsc8xcC1o9qraKSlkzYXKxxaN-2BHRHrk1UMg85k-3D&eorderid=WP-24M3mb2H9JAtqvKsbryoxg7g-3D-3D-24f2I9e0Nt1lm9uH7ACdjPbRn0HGBDfKp6hbFObBhQ1j0-3D)

This is our time of need.**

**

### caroline — 2024-05-04T17:57:58+0300

### JanSz — 2024-05-04T21:30:18+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/prayer-request-for-wisdom-and-grace-re-pancreatic-cancer-dx.28846/post-334273>

Hi Martha!
I will pray for you and your husband.

I would like to make sure that you know of existence of Medicare program that is available to people on Medicare when doctor signs in paper stating that their life expectancy is less than 6 months.

I have found out about it because of my DW story.
Note, that after doctor's signature, when the doctor signs in, there is no obligation to die within 6 months.
The idea is that
the person is under care of that system, at his home or other place.
The care is to keep him/her comfortable, without pain.
But hi is not being medically attempted to be cured.

When my wife's time came, I was able to take her to our home.
But others, in situation like possibly you are in, (with your cancer), you can tell them to take care of your husband outside, in the care facilities.

My wife got really good daily care, medications were arranged by nurses and coming on time.
I did not have to deal with any financial expenses.

They were even attempting to care for our religious needs.
We refused that part, we are Catholics, local priest was visiting her and sending peoples to talk and pray with her.

God bless you both.
.................

> [Martha Ray said:](/goto/post?id=334264)
>
> I love and am devoted to my husband but this is long suffering for me as it does not align with my own journey recovering cancer and cancer treatment over the past 15 years.

### SuzanneF — 2024-05-05T00:22:11+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/prayer-request-for-wisdom-and-grace-re-pancreatic-cancer-dx.28846/post-334278>

> [Martha Ray said:](/goto/post?id=334264)
>
> The month of March my husband developed left abdominal pain radiating around his body an pain that came and went with waves being more intense pain. So far he has chosen care care at two major Virginia hospitals . He had 1st CT scan that revealed 4 cm mass on his pancreas 1 MRI about 12 days later that said WWO contrast that showed 5.5 cm mass on his pancreases another upper body CT wo contrast checking for any spread. On Friday late day 4 26 24 had a endoscopic ultrasound with biopsy of pancreas and we not given paperwork recap when we left the procedure but this biopsy showed up in his “My Chart”.
> Went back to emergency department and was admitted to the hospital this past week after pain meds not working and Told stage 1 or 2 cancer on May 3th.
>
> I am in shock trying to adjust to a very strong and able bodied 86 year old becoming so weak and suffering so much pain so quickly. Both my husband and I are Grace Oriented believers in the Lord Jesus Christ and trusting God for his best direction. I am hoping for the best but preparing for the worst. I love and am devoted to my husband but this is long suffering for me as it does not align with my own journey recovering cancer and cancer treatment over the past 15 years.
>
> After visiting my husband in the hospital the last few days in the hospital I personally am very weak physically, emotionally and mentally.
> Spiritually claiming : Hebrews 4:16 **Let us therefore come boldly to the throne of grace, that we may obtain mercy and find grace to help in time of need.
>
>
>

# Thread: Sun % through pool cage/screen?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sun-through-pool-cage-screen.28848/>
**Subforum:** Biohacking 101
**Posts:** 15
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Sirena — 2024-05-05T01:01:50+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sun-through-pool-cage-screen.28848/post-334280>

Any idea how much light--UV light-- actually penetrates through a pool cage/screen?
The screen appears to be standard in weave and color. Not dark, not super tight weave.
And the screen is rectangular--with no angles.

% of light? More or less.

Similar to a Kiniki?

Thanks--

### NikkiYork — 2024-05-05T01:39:26+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sun-through-pool-cage-screen.28848/post-334281>

I used to work in a gallery, and there were clients coming in asking, do you think this painting fits over my couch? My couch is blue, like a light blue, grayish.

!!!

If your thing has actual holes, uv gets through.
There is material for farms, aluminette and stuff like that, and they tell you exactly how much uv comes through, because they produced it for that purpose.

Why do you need to know?

### Sirena — 2024-05-05T03:25:31+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sun-through-pool-cage-screen.28848/post-334287>

> [NikkiYork said:](/goto/post?id=334281)

> Why do you need to know?

### JanSz — 2024-05-05T03:25:36+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sun-through-pool-cage-screen.28848/post-334288>

> [Sirena said:](/goto/post?id=334280)
>
> Any idea how much light--UV light-- actually penetrates through a pool cage/screen?
> The screen appears to be standard in weave and color. Not dark, not super tight weave.
> And the screen is rectangular--with no angles.
>
> % of light? More or less.
>
> Similar to a Kiniki?
>
> Thanks--

You will get many answers.
Here is mine.
If you are located indoors but windows in your room are open, you get most if not all the UV that you may need.

If you are located indoors with closed windows but the glass in your windows is like 100 or more old, you are getting most of the UV that you may need.

So, if you have pool cage screen (often they are in Florida to fight mosquitos), you are in fully enclosed room, you are not exposed to UV.

/////////////////////

**Sirena think of photons of light not as straight lines as others unfornutaley do but as curved. "Gravitational lensing"**

There is only one current correct answer **proven** by Einstein’s general theory of relativity, time and space are fused together in a quantity known as spacetime. Within this theory, massive objects cause spacetime to curve, and gravity is simply the curvature of spacetime.

**As light travels through spacetime, the theory predicts that the path taken by the light will also be curved by an object’s mass. Gravitational lensing is a dramatic and observable example of Einstein’s theory in action.**

### [How does gravity affect photons (that is, bend light) if photons have no mass? | Astronomy.com](https://www.astronomy.com/science/how-does-gravity-affect-photons-that-is-bend-light-if-photons-have-no-mass/)

categories:Science | tags:Astrophysics, Magazine

 www.astronomy.com

# Thread: Flicker Resources
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/flicker-resources.28856/>
**Subforum:** The EMF Rx
**Posts:** 3
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Mat.I — 2024-05-06T05:33:34+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/flicker-resources.28856/post-334343>

Hi All,
Please see link to Flicker Sense - [https://www.flickersense.org/home](https://www.flickersense.org/home)

A good database for all things relating to Flicker.

Happy reading

### doctorwu85 — 2024-05-06T16:22:12+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/flicker-resources.28856/post-334347>

Thanks for posting. I have a Joov light panel and am planning to upgrade to a FireStorm because of the flicker issue (and to a lesser extent, the dirty electricity issue) with Joovs. In the meantime, if I only use the Joov on my back and do not face the light, is the flicker effect still as harmful? Not sure if it must go into your eye to cause harm, or if it's still bad if it's anywhere on your skin.

### Mat.I — 2024-05-08T08:48:36+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/flicker-resources.28856/post-334442>

> [doctorwu85 said:](/goto/post?id=334347)
>
> Thanks for posting. I have a Joov light panel and am planning to upgrade to a FireStorm because of the flicker issue (and to a lesser extent, the dirty electricity issue) with Joovs. In the meantime, if I only use the Joov on my back and do not face the light, is the flicker effect still as harmful? Not sure if it must go into your eye to cause harm, or if it's still bad if it's anywhere on your skin.

[@doctorwu85](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/29980/) - Quite a few variables to consider e.g. flicker frequency, modulation depth and how that impacts each individual would vary. However, the facts are you would only be using the RLT device for short periods (e.g. 20mins) so it would be very brief exposure. If you are looking away (assuming you are still indoors within a room) you would still experience the flicker effect. Will it be as harmful? based on research I have come across this would be dependant on what response you are trying to prevent. E.g. stimuli in the central vision = increased risk of seizures for flash frequencies (i.e. at quite low frequencies) when compared to being viewed in the periphery. If you are looking to play it safe and are concerned - use it outside during daylight, inside a room during daylight with window completely open whilst looking away or if you need to face it wear a sleep mask or something that would block the flicker to the retina. Noting closing the eyes only can actually increase the exposure to the retina in certain cases. Obviously, if the flicker is "invisible" you want to prevent saccades (high speed eye movements) & the associated effects of this. Hence why eye protection may be necessary.

The issue is that you need to get clear on what manufacturers define flicker free as.. As many apply the visible "flicker" frequency threshold (aka critical fusion frequency), so if it exceeds this then it is technically invisible flicker that is referred to as "temporal light artifact" (TLA) or invisible flicker which allows these manufacturers to advertise products as flicker free, which is very misleading as flicker whether visible or not should be called as it is (i.e. flicker) regardless of the frequency. With "invisible" flicker this is sensed, however not consciously perceived the level of visibility would vary from individual to individual. E.g. this for the average person may be ~ 60 - 70Hz, however people with sensitivities such as people with (ASD) may still be able to observe flicker above this.

I understand that some high powered devices can benefit from a "pulsed" approach as this reduces tissue heating allowing a greater power density to be applied vs the standard continuous wave approach. However, it is important not to get "flicker" confused with carefully calculated intentional pulses. As some manufacturers may claim the flicker is in fact good.

# Thread: The sunrise rule

### Emmanuela — 2024-05-06T19:34:53+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-sunrise-rule.28857/post-334355>

Hi Everyone
I am fairly new to everything but have been reading and listening voraciously.
I am curious as to the never miss a sunrise rule for living at the 43 lat (southern Ontario) for the moment.
I watch the sunrise every morning but with it getting earlier and earlier I am trying to figure out what’s best, getting up for sunrise and taking a nap? Or waking up right after sunrise and still getting outside for the morning light.
Also, if i watch the sunrise for 30-40min or so, then I come inside to eat, I won’t be within the 30min rule for the leptin reset.
Any insight is appreciated!

### Emmanuela — 2024-05-06T20:03:57+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-sunrise-rule.28857/post-334358>

Ok so my first thought was right.
I thought perhaps the extra sunlight would provide enough energy for the long days. But I have yet to test that.

### Joseph LeBlanc — 2024-05-06T20:18:23+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-sunrise-rule.28857/post-334360>

### Emmanuela — 2024-05-06T20:27:17+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-sunrise-rule.28857/post-334361>

Usually 10:30 ish
Once i get the kitchen cleaned up after the kids. But that’s a routine i should change. Dinner earlier and clean up before they fall asleep. I am still nursing though so there are days when my 2 year old is in a growth spurt and nuses more and i get sleepy. That being said, I am slim but still need to improve my leptin sensitivity and get better and reducing nnEMFs, so that might also improve my energy

### Joseph LeBlanc — 2024-05-06T21:06:04+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-sunrise-rule.28857/post-334363>

That's not a bad bedtime considering the sun sets around 8:30 for you.

Sun sets for me around 7:45 currently. I go to bed at 10.

What is your light environment looking like at 8:30pm typically? Also, am I correct in assuming you are considering morning naps bc you are feeling groggy waking with the sun?

### Emmanuela — 2024-05-06T21:18:35+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-sunrise-rule.28857/post-334364>

i don't feel groggy until late afternoon/early evening, right when i need to get dinner for everyone and clean up. I have blue light reducing filters on all devices and I don't typically watch much tv. maybe a couple hours a week. I have blue light blocking glasses as well that I wear in the evening and red lights in the washroom to get ready for bed.

for decades my mom has listened to centralized doctors tell her to avoid the sun

She’s an avid learner and when I shared Dr Jack’s podcasts - ones that my friends said were “too complicated” she absolutely LOVED them and immediately started implementing changes

She walks with a cane but managed to drag a chair up her ramp so she could sit in the sun

She has been getting sun every day

Today she went wild and took an extremely long walk to enjoy the afternoon sun. When my son asked “grandma what’s gotten into you” - she replied with a burst of joy “Dr Jack Kruse!”

She has taken extensive notes from all the podcasts and made me a list of the books I “must” read ;-)

Gratitude to you Jack - for igniting a spark in my mom that is a joy to see

### Mat.I — 2024-05-16T03:40:12+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/new-2024-cornet-emf-meter.28911/post-334772>

Hi All,
Have you used the new Cornet 2024 ED98QPro 5G EMF meter? If so do you have any feedback?

It appears to be a good allrounder that now includes a light flicker mode that captures 400 - 700THz at 400-700nm.

With regard to RF it appears to have a slightly broader frequency range when compared to the safe and sound pro 2, however it begs the question does the cornet still maintain accuracy within the higher frequency ranges (for 5G) also would it be capable of detecting narrow pulses. It states 25000 times/sec down to 100usec for short pulses. It does exclude millimetre wave bands, which as I understand would be used in the radio spectrum ranges of 24Ghz and 100Ghz relating to highspeed 5G which falls outside the cornets frequency range anyway.. Glad these are not near me..

Obviously for professional grade you would be looking at safe and sound pro 2 & possibly a gigahertz solutions NFA1000. However, based on the specs and features of the new cornet it appears to be half decent (subject to actually meeting those specs) with an added bonus of a flicker meter. See below -

# Thread: Smartphones for kids in UK
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/smartphones-for-kids-in-uk.28913/>
**Subforum:** Optimal Kids
**Posts:** 2
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### giedremail — 2024-05-16T16:20:01+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/smartphones-for-kids-in-uk.28913/post-334793>

\*Must-watch for Parents & Headteachers: Debate unites MPs country-wide and calls for urgent change for children & smartphones\*

Tuesday morning’s Westminster Hall debate saw MP Miriam Coates give a powerful, articulate and well-researched speech, drawing huge support from a number of MPs who stood to commend her motion and add their own views and concerns.

In fact, so many wanted to contribute that the Deputy Speaker had to limit responses to 4 mins per MP, demonstrating how many MPs and their constituents want this issue addressed

Speakers included MP and former secondary school teacher/ head of year Michael Gullis who spoke passionately about the clear and urgent need to ban smartphones in schools, for the health of children and teachers (a profession now struggling under the weight of social media-driven issues) ‍

We recommend you watch at least the first 30 mins as it gets straight to the heart of the matter. \*We also urge you to send this link to your community and Headteachers and call for them to watch it\*.

\*Watch here:\*

### [Parliamentlive.tv](https://parliamentlive.tv/event/index/3e463ce6-15a2-4ecd-b033-5a55cafc20c5)

Westminster Hall

 parliamentlive.tv

### giedremail — 2024-05-16T16:20:29+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/smartphones-for-kids-in-uk.28913/post-334794>

### [Smartphone free childhood The movement for a smartphone free childhood](https://smartphonefreechildhood.co.uk/)

Smartphone Free Childhood is a grassroots movement on a mission to keep childhood smartphone free. We want to connect parents in their local communities so that together they can make a pact not to give their children smartphones until at least 14, or social media before the age of 16.

 smartphonefreechildhood.co.uk

# Thread: Low leptin, nnEMFs and solar panels + electric fence
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/low-leptin-nnemfs-and-solar-panels-electric-fence.28922/>
**Subforum:** The EMF Rx
**Posts:** 7
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Emmanuela — 2024-05-19T18:16:39+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/low-leptin-nnemfs-and-solar-panels-electric-fence.28922/post-334899>

Hi Folks,

I just want to sound this out. I am reading a lot and my brain is still trying to catch up. A lot of the more complex information feels like scattered puzzle pieces so bear with me for a moment.
I have a horse who is older, was doing phenomenally well until a couple years ago where he seemed to lose strength and stability. Then about a year and a half ago, he lost a ton of weight all of a sudden. The more i read about the mitochondria and nnEMF the more my brain is churning.
This is the background:
He has lived outside like a wild horse with access to water, shade, grass and free range hay at his leisure since i bought him almost 20 years ago.
5 years ago i moved him to a new place. Here there are electric fences and a ton of solar panels very close to the pasture.
Last year was before I discovered Jack Kruse work. In the summer, when the sun is strong and the grass starts growing. He puts on a good amount of weight but not quite enough.
Winter comes along and he slowly looses weight followed by rapid weight loss when temperatures hit -15 C and below. before i learned about all of this my suspicion was age and intolerance to the cold. But it didn’t quite sit right for me because it felt too sudden.
I am starting to think something has slowly chipped away at his mitochondrial health.
Given he lives outside with no artificial light 24/7. I tested him for worms, and he his count is near zero.
Perhaps an EMF meter reading can help me piece this together a little more. What i researched so far on nnEMFs from solar panel inverters, it doesn’t look good for him. The property has a ton of solar panels all around.
I am going to get an EMF reader, see what is shows me, and obviously find another place i can move him to.
From what i understand, perhaps the stronger sunlight is helping his body function a little better in the summer with all the disrupting nnEMFs and its not just the weather and extra calories present in spring grass.
Just wanted to write my thoughts out somewhere with people in the same tribe. Any thoughts on any other factors I am missing in my theory are always appreciated

### JanSz — 2024-05-19T20:28:34+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/low-leptin-nnemfs-and-solar-panels-electric-fence.28922/post-334901>

My father had horses that were working on his small farm.
Over the winter they would eat hay, clover and drank water.
Eventually they became low energy, hard to excite with anything.
About a month or little more before he expected to put them to work, they were getting **pressed** oats. At first not much, latter as much as they wanted.
Eventually they became energetic, kept their heads high, much harder to control, eager to spend all that energy.

# Thread: "Full Spectrum" Bulb vs Full Spectrum Sunlight
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/full-spectrum-bulb-vs-full-spectrum-sunlight.28930/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 1
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Joseph LeBlanc — 2024-05-21T18:48:06+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/full-spectrum-bulb-vs-full-spectrum-sunlight.28930/post-334966>

{ "lightbox\_close": "Close", "lightbox\_next": "Next", "lightbox\_previous": "Previous", "lightbox\_error": "The requested content cannot be loaded. Please try again later.", "lightbox\_start\_slideshow": "Start slideshow", "lightbox\_stop\_slideshow": "Stop slideshow", "lightbox\_full\_screen": "Full screen", "lightbox\_thumbnails": "Thumbnails", "lightbox\_download": "Download", "lightbox\_share": "Share", "lightbox\_zoom": "Zoom", "lightbox\_new\_window": "New window", "lightbox\_toggle\_sidebar": "Toggle sidebar" }

I drew this rough sketch illustrating the vast difference in full spectrum sunlight vs "full spectrum" indoor lighting in terms of intensity and wavelength.

If based on a clear sunny summer day, the intensity difference is still not to proper scale. I had to "pump up" the bulb spectrum intensity so it would be somewhat visible on the graph. The bulb spectrum really should be about 10x shorter than depicted.

Also, the bulb spectrum I drew is based on the "full spectrum" lighting used at the school I teach at. That is the spectrum the company (Elite Lighting) purports their lights emit. Our school uses the "crisp white" spectrum lights.

Currently missing so much in the way of intensity and frequency range while inside this nnEMF hellscape.

### Annelieuk — 2024-05-25T10:22:19+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/where-do-i-find-the-link-for-sundays-pow-wow.28947/post-335131>

Hey guys, I am completely new and am not sure how to access the link and page where I can enter questions for this weekends live with Jack?

Many thanks
Annelie

### JanSz — 2024-05-25T15:54:49+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/where-do-i-find-the-link-for-sundays-pow-wow.28947/post-335137>

> [Annelieuk said:](/goto/post?id=335131)
>
> Hey guys, I am completely new and am not sure how to access the link and page where I can enter **questions for this weekends live with Jack?**
>
> Many thanks
> Annelie

What type of member are you?
Have you got invitation?
Were you able to open that invitation on your computer?
If you got invitation, but not able to open it, try another browsers.
If that does not work on computer, try another computer, or try cell phone?
After you eventually see on your screen (the complete invitation) you will be able to see a form (that you never before was able to see).
On that form, after you finish the part about you attending the event,
will be a part where you be able to pose your question.

When you are there, if your question is longer than few words,
personally, I type it in some other place (where I am able to see complete question),
then copy/paste.

When all above fails, try support.
