> 2.  Environment - needs testing and optimization. We turn off wifi at a night. Just purchased meters and ethernet cables.
> 3.  Diet: I assume caffeine and alcohol worsen the ratio? Will focus on decreasing carb intake further.
> 4.  Body composition: Is there any leeway to what the optimal BUN:Cr ratio is based on body composition? My Cr will always be lowish due to low muscle mass - given the low denominator, is my target still <10?
>
> Any comments greatly appreciated, including areas I have missed. Otherwise, I can take up with Jack in a consult.

Excited about progress:

\- no caffeine for 2 weeks
\- environment: learned to use RF meter, and was horrified by readings from WiFi and near cell phone. WiFi now off, and using ethernet only. Phones were already distanced from us at night, but now distancing during the day too.

Will be retesting to measure effects on ratio, though unclear how responsive the ratio is (ie. does it fluctuate on a day-to-day, week-to-week, or month-to-month basis once consistent efforts to improve redox have been made?).

### rtd — 2025-09-15T01:14:53+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/high-bun-cr-ratio.29452/post-359511>

> [Kirsten F said:](/goto/post?id=339667)
>
> New to posting! Hoping to optimize cellular dehydration and retest before reconsultation with Dr. Kruse.
>
> Background: 43 yo F, living in ES. Hx: IOL replacements 3 years ago (vision correction for high myopia), PCOS, BMI 21. Consult with Jack in April 2024 re: long-standing migraines. I have been doing very well re: my light environment and using my “solar panels” since I have a “tarp” over my eyes.
>
> On retesting, vit D rose to 59 from 30. BUN:Cr ratio is shit - 21 (Cr 0.7, BUN 15).
>
> Ideas and questions re: ratio:
>
> 1.  Grounding - not easy on my property, but needs to be optimized
> 2.  Environment - needs testing and optimization. We turn off wifi at a night. Just purchased meters and ethernet cables.
> 3.  Diet: I assume caffeine and alcohol worsen the ratio? Will focus on decreasing carb intake further.
> 4.  Body composition: Is there any leeway to what the optimal BUN:Cr ratio is based on body composition? My Cr will always be lowish due to low muscle mass - given the low denominator, is my target still <10?
>
> Any comments greatly appreciated, including areas I have missed. Otherwise, I can take up with Jack in a consult.

Did your BUN/CR ratio improve?

Your Vit D level higher a year later?

### Kirsten F — 2025-09-15T02:41:39+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/high-bun-cr-ratio.29452/post-359516>

> [rtd said:](/goto/post?id=359511)
>
> Did your BUN/CR ratio improve?
>
> Your Vit D level higher a year later?

Hello.

My best BUN/Cr ratio was 10, most recent was 15.

Vit was up to 70 then down to 59 again. I am revisiting nnEMF (can always improve, but had thought I was doing well). Also increasing sun exposure - I have a solid tan so probably need more sun now to produce vit D than in the past.

### kathleendowns — 2024-09-18T15:47:12+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/posterior-vitreous-detachment.29459/post-339695>

Experiencing flashes in my right eye and have a floater in my left eye. No tear. Any thoughts on this? Thx

### kathleendowns — 2024-09-18T17:14:22+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/posterior-vitreous-detachment.29459/post-339696>

Anything I can do to help this condition resolve?

### Anthony Smith — 2024-09-18T20:06:45+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/posterior-vitreous-detachment.29459/post-339705>

My wife had some similar issues. Her Ophthalmologist told her floaters are “normal” and will be absorbed over time . . . Flashes not so good and CAN indicate a retina problem.

### kathleendowns — 2024-09-18T20:32:53+0300

### Pratima — 2024-09-18T22:50:27+0300

### [The "rE" Monitor | Eye-Friendly Color RLCD Monitor](https://www.sunvisiondisplay.com/rE-Monitor)

Sun Vision Display's "rE" Computer Monitors utilize Full-Color RLCD Technology: A 100% backlight free display technology that is gentle on your eyes!

 www.sunvisiondisplay.com

No backlight and no flicker. I have my screen in the garage with an open door - anyone see any issues with these?

### aruetenik — 2024-09-21T18:58:05+0300

### Horace Highwater — 2024-09-23T07:12:32+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/reflective-lcd-monitor-for-work-outside-has-anyone-tried-tested.29474/post-339877>

I also went down the monitor rabbit hole a short while ago. I bought an expensive, color eInk based monitor, which I never use. The RLCD does seem like it could be a better option, for me at least, but one potential downside to consider, is that those monitors max out at a 1080p resolution. If that isn't an issue for you at a 32" size, then probably give it a shot. If you do, please let me know what you think!

### Gian — 2025-01-22T21:57:54+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/reflective-lcd-monitor-for-work-outside-has-anyone-tried-tested.29474/post-345588>

> [Jordan said:](/goto/post?id=341358)
>
> Hey that's my ledstrain post haha! If you guys would like a video showing around it I can certainly do that.

I was really interested in these monitors, but unfortunately, after some back and forth with the company, they said that these monitors are not intended for outdoor use

### Jordan — 2025-01-24T01:46:57+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/reflective-lcd-monitor-for-work-outside-has-anyone-tried-tested.29474/post-345666>

> [Gian said:](/goto/post?id=345588)
>
> I was really interested in these monitors, but unfortunately, after some back and forth with the company, they said that these monitors are not intended for outdoor use

I think an RLCD would be a better option for outdoor use. It takes the light from the front of the panel and reflects it back up to illuminate the display. Their 2.0 model is the latest one that uses a true 8 bit hannspree panel so there's no FRC (temproal dithering) that could cause strain like most displays use.

### [Eazeye Monitors | Naturally Lit Displays for Eye Comfort](https://eazeye.com/?sca_ref=7856956.uSktkdPdDKVa5K6x)

We design naturally lit devices that reduce eyestrain and energy use through reflective display technology.

 eazeye.com

### Jordan — 2025-01-24T01:50:29+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/reflective-lcd-monitor-for-work-outside-has-anyone-tried-tested.29474/post-345667>

Sunvision also makes a RLCD monitor but their 24" version is the only true 8 bit one. The others that are 32" are using 6+2 frc panel. I'm assuming their "eve" 24" model uses the same 23.8" hannspree panel as eazeye. I just know eazeye uses a special coating to make there's appear brighter but unsure how much that changes the color spectrum that's being reflected back. Sun vision also is significantly pricier but they do have cover glass which might look nicer.

### [The rE 2.0 Dawn and Eve | Frontlit Color RLCD Monitors](https://www.sunvisiondisplay.com/rE-Monitor-Frontlight)

The rE 2.0 Monitors, Dawn (32") and Eve (24"), feature Color RLCD Technology with a built-in frontlight for eye comforclarity day and night.

 www.sunvisiondisplay.com

### Gian — 2025-02-13T22:12:53+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/reflective-lcd-monitor-for-work-outside-has-anyone-tried-tested.29474/post-346691>

> [Jordan said:](/goto/post?id=345667)
>
> Sunvision also makes a RLCD monitor but their 24" version is the only true 8 bit one. The others that are 32" are using 6+2 frc panel. I'm assuming their "eve" 24" model uses the same 23.8" hannspree panel as eazeye. I just know eazeye uses a special coating to make there's appear brighter but unsure how much that changes the color spectrum that's being reflected back. Sun vision also is significantly pricier but they do have cover glass which might look nicer.
>
>
> ### [The rE 2.0 Dawn and Eve | Frontlit Color RLCD Monitors](https://www.sunvisiondisplay.com/rE-Monitor-Frontlight)
>
> The rE 2.0 Monitors, Dawn (32") and Eve (24"), feature Color RLCD Technology with a built-in frontlight for eye comforclarity day and night.
>
>  www.sunvisiondisplay.com

Yes, the Sunvisions are extremely expensive, so it is difficult to make this investment. However, they have a track record / have established themselves as a legitimate company whereas the Eazeye company is a startup essentially selling prototypes.

I would be interested in hearing more about your experience with your Spectrumview monitor and if you are still up to it, a video of your monitor.

Anybody here seen my old friend Abraham?
Can you tell me where he's gone?
He freed lotta people but it seems the good they die young
You know I just looked around and he's gone
Anybody here seen my old friend John?
Can you tell me where he's gone?
He freed lotta people but it seems the good they die young
I just looked around and he's gone

Anybody here seen my old friend Martin?
Can you tell me where he's gone?
He freed lotta people but it seems the good they die young
I just looked around and he's gone
Didn't you love the things that they stood for?
Didn't they try to find some good for you and me?
And we'll be free
Some day soon, it's gonna be one day
Anybody here seen my old friend Bobby?
Can you tell me where he's gone?
I thought I saw him walkin' up over the hill
With Abraham, Martin, and John

# Thread: All Along the Watch Tower
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/all-along-the-watch-tower.29486/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 1
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Uswebers1 — 2024-09-23T06:27:44+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/all-along-the-watch-tower.29486/post-339873>

There must be some way out of here
Said the joker to the thief
There's too much confusion
I can't get no relief

Businessmen, they drink my wine
Plowmen dig my earth
None of them along the line
Know what any of it is worth

"No reason to get excited"
The thief, he kindly spoke
"There are many here among us
Who feel that life is but a joke"

"But you and I, we've been through that
And this is not our fate
So, let us not talk falsely now
The hour is getting late"

All along the watchtower
Princes kept the view
While all the women came and went
Barefoot servants, too

Outside, in the distance
A wildcat did growl
Two riders were approaching
The wind began to howl

There's battle lines being drawn
Nobody's right if everybody's wrong
Young people speaking their minds

It starts when you're always afraid

You better stop

Everybody look, what's going down?

# Thread: Grounding the ethernet cable for wired laptop use
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/grounding-the-ethernet-cable-for-wired-laptop-use.29513/>
**Subforum:** The EMF Rx
**Posts:** 5
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### eve001 — 2024-10-01T18:03:27+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/grounding-the-ethernet-cable-for-wired-laptop-use.29513/post-340236>

On how to ground your ethernet. Here they do it with a copper tape stuck to the ethernet cable plug connected with an aligator clip to a grounding cable. They attach the tape at the plug where the ethernet cable goes into the laptop. This is for ethernet cables with these metally plugs.

I wonder why Jeremy Johnson recommends otherwise. (emfanalysis)
It seems that the adapter he links to is actually an ethernet cable connector wrapped into some conductive foil that has a wire that goes to a plug. In any case Johnson recommends grounding it with a ground pen outside in the garden as EMI comes in through the plugs.

Johnson does not explain how to make it yourself - unless that blog post escaped me - but as we don't need the plug coz we will ground outside in the earth, why buy the expensive kit? If yiu can ordered aligator clips, connectors, plugs, tape....
Why would Jeromy want to put this connector in between? For distance from laptop?
If I recall well he uses a shorter cable on one end of the connector (the side of router/modem) and a longer one toward the computer...

If we opt for video above solution without connector =
Why do they ground the ethernet cable plug where it goes into the laptop and not where it comes out of the router/modem/switch?

On the other hand Johnson also recommends ethernetadaptors that come with a grounding on them. So maybe it's insignificant where to ground it.

The options he links to are not easy available in EU. I came across one link but lost it. That's another reason why I look in to DIY solutions.

### Pablo — 2024-10-01T18:15:17+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/grounding-the-ethernet-cable-for-wired-laptop-use.29513/post-340238>

### [Cable conectar ordenador a tierra | Materiales anti radiación electromagnética](https://www.proteccionelectromagnetica.com/tienda/productos-de-proteccion-electromagnetica-personal-para-moviles-y-ordenadores/cable-para-conectar-el-ordenador-a-tierra/)

Cable para conectar el ordenador a tierra. Comprar materiales anti radiación electromagnética para proteccion contra radiación electromagnética

 www.proteccionelectromagnetica.com

I´m not expert on this, but here in Spain I bought this grounding cable for my laptop and it seems to work, at least the electric field meassures that are huge otherwise go down to very little, and I get less tired from comp use. It is made for connection to a plug, I do not know about comercial cables to plug it directly to the earth, maybe you have to DIY, or if you find some good solution I´m all ears.

### eve001 — 2024-10-01T18:21:24+0300

It is made for connection to a plug, I do not know about comercial cables to plug it directly to the earth, maybe you have to DIY, or if you find some good solution I´m all ears.

Great! Thanks, that was the lost link!

You can get an AM/FM radio to test if there's lots of EMI on your electric circuit indoors. If there is, it may be better, if possible, to ground it outside. With all the solar panels, tesla car loading stations, etc. dirtying the AC grid w/ EMI : If at all possible grounding outdoors is probably better. As is working outdoors....

### eve001 — 2024-10-02T11:44:26+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/grounding-the-ethernet-cable-for-wired-laptop-use.29513/post-340299>

> [Pablo said:](/goto/post?id=340238)
>
> ### [Cable conectar ordenador a tierra | Materiales anti radiación electromagnética](https://www.proteccionelectromagnetica.com/tienda/productos-de-proteccion-electromagnetica-personal-para-moviles-y-ordenadores/cable-para-conectar-el-ordenador-a-tierra/)
>
> Cable para conectar el ordenador a tierra. Comprar materiales anti radiación electromagnética para proteccion contra radiación electromagnética
>
>  www.proteccionelectromagnetica.com
>

> I´m not expert on this, but here in Spain I bought this grounding cable for my laptop and it seems to work, at least the electric field meassures that are huge otherwise go down to very little, and I get less tired from comp use. It is made for connection to a plug, I do not know about comercial cables to plug it directly to the earth, maybe you have to DIY, or if you find some good solution I´m all ears.

Pablo, this cable is also to ground the laptop, not the ethernet cable.

If you work with battery the EMFs in your laptop will be lower. (Battery adviced above charging cable)
But I guess you will still have the DE/LF EMF through the ethernet cable.
With jump conduction it may easily get to you tas you use your keyboard or have metals in your desk etc.
Better then it seems to ground excess EMFs before they enter the laptop.

I have heard talk about grounding loops (translated - not sure right English term) which should be avoided.
This can happen if your system is grounded at different places.
The problem w/ the ethernet and modem is that often the ethernet female plugs in the modem are plastic. Second, the plug of the modem into the AC is rarely grounded.
Therefor even if our male ethernet cable plug is shielded it won't be grounded through the modem.

Some people use switches and ground these. Do these switches have metallic female plugs though?
Also if we do not need switches and plan traveling and want simple, mobile solutions grounding ethernet may be better.
I have ordered materials to try this.

Who has optimized their set-up LF EMF-wise? How did you do it?

# Thread: Lowering LF EMFs in bedroom when we cannot (yet) have an AC kill switch
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/lowering-lf-emfs-in-bedroom-when-we-cannot-yet-have-an-ac-kill-switch.29517/>
**Subforum:** The EMF Rx
**Posts:** 7
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### eve001 — 2024-10-02T11:35:56+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/lowering-lf-emfs-in-bedroom-when-we-cannot-yet-have-an-ac-kill-switch.29517/post-340297>

Hello,

I want to reduce LF EMFs and DE in my bedroom.
Installing a kill switch has my preference but is not possible here.
Looking for alternatives till I have a better home.

I just called w/ a shielding company recomending ADR Tex = a grounded fabric claimed to channel out both LF and HF.
You put it underneath you (did not get where exactly - under matrass or just under matrass protector?)
If needed you can put another one on top of you, to shield from fields above you, the person at the phone said.

### [Tissu anti-ondes ADR TEX contre les pollutions électromagnétiques de basses et hautes fréquences, les tensions induites et les champs électrostatiques - Etudes et vie](https://www.etudesetvie.be/produit/tissu-anti-ondes-adr-tex-contre-les-basses-et-hautes-frequences/)

Tissu anti-ondes ADR TEX. Le seul tissu capable de réduire les pollutions électromagnétiques de basses et de hautes fréquences

 www.etudesetvie.be

I asked if this fabric shields both electric and magnetic components of the AC current.
They said there is no magnetic component here - if I got that well.
That confused me as I thought these fields EMF - electro-magnetic fields - always have an electric and a magnetic component.
I have heard that shielding the electric component is far easier than shielding the magnetic component.
Some people for this reason do not believe in shielding at all.

This fabric is the size of a matrass - and comes thus in different sizes.
Prices: 116-228€

Your thoughts on / experience w/ this ADR Tex?
Your alternatives apart from the kill switch?

Now, say I get this shield and it works: "if I wake up at three to go for a pee", then I'll have to get off this fabric into the bathroom and going there will have >1000mV AC sent through my body again.
So: I am in favor of the kill switch and of changing zipcode.
Till I have realized that, I look for improvement of current (sleep) environment.

Thanks!

### pfedorow — 2024-10-02T18:51:36+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/lowering-lf-emfs-in-bedroom-when-we-cannot-yet-have-an-ac-kill-switch.29517/post-340315>

I dunno you never want to ground yourself or what your on in a shitty environment as you become the path of least resistance. Have you read this thread?

[https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-leptin-melanocortin-pathway-and-lyme-risk-ac-power-grid-problem.29476/](https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-leptin-melanocortin-pathway-and-lyme-risk-ac-power-grid-problem.29476/)

Are you on the top or bottom floor? Maybe instead of kill switch rewire your room with a disconnect to completely kill power to it. Mind you are probably in the soup but it might help some what. Have you had a building biologist look at your place or are you diy?

What country are you located?

### eve001 — 2024-10-02T20:45:29+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/lowering-lf-emfs-in-bedroom-when-we-cannot-yet-have-an-ac-kill-switch.29517/post-340320>

Hi,

[@pfedorow](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/22655/) You'll have to trust me on this. Rewiring etc is not possible here. Not my property nor my rental contract either.
The owner just does not want that as it would imply lots of breaking open the walls etc. Its sad coz this place could be turned into a nice little safe niche.

So while I look for a new home, I hoped to find a way to improve my bedroom here.

No, we don't reall have lots of measurement specialists here in Belgium, EU.
And neither do we have lots of electricians - nor electricians that are EMF aware.
The ones I called today will not come just to check for my 'sleep sanctuary', they are far away also and expenses for travel would be huge. It makes no sense to check the whole property as I do not plan to stay here.
The other measurement specialist seems very tunnel focussed so far on RF.
\=> We lack and need well schooled building biologists and EMF aware electricians in Belgium today.

When I'll be better I may decide to study eventually building biology myself, or not.
This situation is why I am and have been studying these topics for months now.
Bc I see everybody spending loads of money on doctors, on suppls, on people who call themlselves measurement specialists etc., on DE filters, on shielding materials. Without any of them making progress.

Yes, I read the thread on AC and lyme etc.

### eve001 — 2024-10-02T20:58:25+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/lowering-lf-emfs-in-bedroom-when-we-cannot-yet-have-an-ac-kill-switch.29517/post-340323>

I called another business in shielding materials. And will share what I learned.
They are Dutch and don't know of building biologists for Belgium.

ADR Tex for shielding LF EMFs:
This man agreed w/ me that there is an electric field also but that this is very complex and very hard to shield.
I appreciate his honesty. If I want to use this ADR Tex, he says, it needs to be grounded well. Not just with a DIY wire outdoors.
Also I must take care not to attract fields form above when shielding from fields from below.
In this house plugs upstairs are not grounded. Even for little jobs it's hard to find an electrician who has time.
Last one scheduled an intervention one year from now.

So 2 problems:
\- find some electrician to create good grounding
\- find out if there are magnetic fields of significant impact

There is one material that shields magnetic fields, but it is very expensive (forgot to ask how expensive).

\- The electric field from AC gives a body voltage above 1 Volt, which is even too high for the daytime.
\- It is realistic that there may be a magnetic field too.
\- Breakers cannot be switched off.

May not be worth the hassle.

Another subject: I also asked him about these RF canopees/tents for travelling.
He said these do not attract LF fields if they are not shielded.

# Thread: Does UV light on scars cause hyperpigmentation?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/does-uv-light-on-scars-cause-hyperpigmentation.29529/>
**Subforum:** Biohacking 101
**Posts:** 3
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Guy Houri — 2024-10-03T11:05:53+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/does-uv-light-on-scars-cause-hyperpigmentation.29529/post-340360>

It is centralized knowledge To not let scars out in the sun. Is it realy the case? It seems contradicting to me.
My freind currently has big scars and doesn't want to go out in the sun
Would like to hear your opinions - thank you

### dizorri — 2024-10-17T18:32:32+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/does-uv-light-on-scars-cause-hyperpigmentation.29529/post-341138>

Hey, interestingly may be so. If you ever deadlifted and got shin scars from the bar, youll notice a lot individuals will have them. I tan frequently and noticed mine have disappeared or got "tanned". Would have to look into research if any out there, depends on scar tissue and layers.

### greentrees — 2024-10-27T04:15:09+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/does-uv-light-on-scars-cause-hyperpigmentation.29529/post-341573>

Avoiding the sun makes wound recovery worse and delays the removal of hyperpigmentation. You need strong sunlight penetrating from 0.1mm depth to 15cm depth through the skin, especially the strong smaller penetrating UV light. Paint the red away.

With existing scar tissue, they can look more pronounced due to the surrounding skin emitting UV light. Scar tissue doesn't absorb + emit light like regular collagen)

It hasn't been expanded upon, but it appears sun exposure can push scar tissue to the surface. It can probably exfoliate scar tissue and regenerate higher functioning collagen underneath, being closer to normal skin. I've had one box scar 10mm wide x 6mm deep that's filled in to be 6mm wide x 3mm deep, with better collagen. Wouldn't of been possible without sunlight and wouldn't of happened in the first place if I was getting sun + sleep (proper wound healing)

They may be interested in Dr Pickart's copper peptide skin care programs, he uses topical copper peptides + topical exfoliating acids. I think you can do the same thing by eating oysters (high in copper) and using the sun to naturally exfoliate dead skin cells. The problem with the topical acids is they make people sensitive to sunlight. Targeting the acid on scar tissue alone, away from healthy normal skin could potentially work with the sun.

### Chlo_e — 2024-10-03T20:10:22+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/selective-brain-cooling-recommendations-for-devices.29532/post-340374>

Hi all,

I'm looking for a device that can be used to specifically cool the head and neck area- like what would be used for sports head injuries or concussions. I've been using a catalyst cryohelmet and getting a great response- I'm wondering if anyone has any recommendations for a more professional/high-level cooling system?

Some of the devices I've seen look great (like polarcap)- they are portable so can be used whilst outside for long periods and they use cold fluid through a hood- however they are only selling to sports teams not private owners.

Any tips much appreciated and I will continue to search for something suitable.

### DLO — 2024-10-05T17:34:26+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/selective-brain-cooling-recommendations-for-devices.29532/post-340457>

So you want to take something that is emf free and switch to something electric with more fields around your head and neck? >.<
You are aware they sell additional ice packs right? Get 3-4 additional sets and leave them in a insulated pack or car fridge. Rotate as needed.
These are common nowadays for car racing but they have other applications but more for torso cooling, but there is a hooded version.

### [Medical – COOLSHIRT SYSTEMS](https://coolshirt.com/product-category/medical/)

 coolshirt.com

### Chlo_e — 2024-10-05T18:24:21+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/selective-brain-cooling-recommendations-for-devices.29532/post-340459>

Cheers- yeah I've got additional icepack sets. The machines I'm interested in don't have any electrical wiring to the body-wraps themselves, just tubing for water, so the machine can be placed far away from the body and quite a few are portable and don't need mains connection whilst in use. Have meters to check electrical fields and DE etc. Anecdotally I've heard good things if you can keep the head cool for longer periods particularly overnight, and although the cryohood is good it wouldn't cut it overnight without a lot of disruption for ice pack changes. Still intend to use the cryohood for shorter periods. Thanks for the link

# Thread: Daylight Blue Light Blocking Glasses Recommendations
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/daylight-blue-light-blocking-glasses-recommendations.29538/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 2
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### robtherhino — 2024-10-04T13:39:49+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/daylight-blue-light-blocking-glasses-recommendations.29538/post-340407>

Hi Everyone,

**Background**
My wife and I work remotely.
We work outside as much as we can, but with winter coming in Romania, we will need to move indoors.
We both use f.lux (2700K during daytime, 1200K around sunset and night time).
I want to buy a pair of daylight blue light blocking glasses (yellow lenses).
I'm not sure which ones to get and how much blue light to filter.

**Options**

Mitolight - free shipping in Europe and cheapest option I've found.

\- Day light blocks around 30% ([https://www.mitolight.com/glasses-blue-blockers-pride-day/](https://www.mitolight.com/glasses-blue-blockers-pride-day/))
\- Dusk blocks about 80% ([https://www.mitolight.com/glasses-blue-blockers-pride-dusk/](https://www.mitolight.com/glasses-blue-blockers-pride-dusk/))

Ra Optics

\- Daylight glasses block up to 95% of blue light ([https://raoptics.com/collections/day-lenses/products/maxwell-day](https://raoptics.com/collections/day-lenses/products/maxwell-day))

Viva Rays
\- Daylight lenses block 50%, up to 470nm, [https://vivarays.com/collections/daytime-circadian-glasses/products/daygoz](https://vivarays.com/collections/daytime-circadian-glasses/products/daygoz)

Other alternatives is to get some daytime bulbs, or a mix of lights to simulate daylight inside (i.e. UV, IR, etc.).

Our budget is tight, so looking for the biggest bang for our buck at the moment.
Happy to invest more in the future.

Any suggestions welcome!

### rtd — 2024-10-04T14:39:06+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/daylight-blue-light-blocking-glasses-recommendations.29538/post-340409>

I searched the forum and found this link:

[https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-basis-of-redox-power-is-here.24748/#post-287003](https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-basis-of-redox-power-is-here.24748/#post-287003)

# Thread: Oyster w/ parasites
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/oyster-w-parasites.29542/>
**Subforum:** The Epi-Paleo Diet
**Posts:** 2
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### eve001 — 2024-10-05T13:01:30+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/oyster-w-parasites.29542/post-340443>

Hi,

This week again we tried oysters and again they came with these worms in them. I had 4. The next day wanted to have 4 more and there were the worms. In March we had the same issue, these worms were green. March we had creuses. Now we hat plats / flat oysters.
Here there seems to be this plague. I heard they crossed European oysters with Japanese oysters to get rid of this plague. But it did not work and the worms changed color - have not fact checked.

Do you people too see worms in your freshly opened oysters? Do you still eat them anyhow?
One of the 4 I ate had this bitter taste and I spitted it out.

In Belgium and France we traditionally have them raw, freshly opened, with lemon or vinager and pepper.
In French brasseries they will serve them with buttered white bread sandwiches.

Funny anecdote: I called the shop. The seafood department joked if I was sure it was not a caterpillar. I said: well... actually it was a butterfly!
We laughed. He asked if I was drunk. I don't drink alcohol. I asked if he himself eats them with the worms. His answer was not a straight yes but avoidant.  We'll be refunded without problem. Fresh oysters and seafood are expensive and luxury foods here.

I get really thirsty when I eat venus shells or mussles, unfortunately. It may be the garlic too.

### markthesunbather — 2024-10-06T21:41:08+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/oyster-w-parasites.29542/post-340517>

I like them lightly steamed myself.

# Thread: Best Video Cameras for Home That Doesn't Use WiFi?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/best-video-cameras-for-home-that-doesnt-use-wifi.29561/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 5
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### TaylorJamesTJ — 2024-10-06T23:49:54+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/best-video-cameras-for-home-that-doesnt-use-wifi.29561/post-340527>

I just replaced all the light bulbs in my home with Boncharge bulbs to have low flicker and low to no blue light. Unplugged Google Smart devices and my Smart TV. Eventually will replace Nest Thermostats.

I want to have my WiFi turned off as much as possible, and have it turned off at night. However, I have 3 cameras that operate off WiFi.

Ring Doorbell
Ring Camera over my garage and covering the side entrance to backyard
Nest Display that has a camera watching back sliding door

I still need to have video surveillance, but obviously these devices without WiFi they don't record anything.

What have you guys used to be able to record video of your home without needing WiFi or video cameras that are low nnEMF?

### Lukassss — 2024-10-07T07:56:30+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/best-video-cameras-for-home-that-doesnt-use-wifi.29561/post-340530>

IP DAHUA IPC-HFW1439TL1-A-IL 4Mpx 2.8mm Smart Dual Light, Mikrofon PoE

### Pratima — 2024-10-07T07:56:36+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/best-video-cameras-for-home-that-doesnt-use-wifi.29561/post-340531>

Is there a high chance of burglary that makes this surveillance necessary? 6 years or so ago, I had a couple of timber gates put up which prevents anyone walking around the house. No wifi, and they do the job.

### rtd — 2024-10-07T16:03:00+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/best-video-cameras-for-home-that-doesnt-use-wifi.29561/post-340537>

> [TaylorJamesTJ said:](/goto/post?id=340527)
>
> I want to have my WiFi turned off as much as possible, and have it turned off at night. However, I have 3 cameras that operate off WiFi.
>
> Ring Doorbell
> Ring Camera over my garage and covering the side entrance to backyard
> Nest Display that has a camera watching back sliding door

Hard wired ethernet eliminates Wifi, yet requires more work. The PoE comment, the devices listed would need a PoE RJ-45 compliant jack. PoE sends DC over Cat5+ ethernet cables and higher. Otherwise need a power source with a regular RJ-45 jack

### TaylorJamesTJ — 2024-10-09T20:34:22+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/best-video-cameras-for-home-that-doesnt-use-wifi.29561/post-340705>

# Thread: WIFI Analyzer APP - Free & Open Source
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/wifi-analyzer-app-free-open-source.29576/>
**Subforum:** The EMF Rx
**Posts:** 2
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Mat.I — 2024-10-09T06:33:28+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/wifi-analyzer-app-free-open-source.29576/post-340675>

Hi All,
See link - [https://play.google.com/store/apps/...open\_source?id=com.vrem.wifianalyzer&hl=en\_NZ](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details/WiFiAnalyzer_open_source?id=com.vrem.wifianalyzer&hl=en_NZ)

Stumbled upon this when trying to locate WIFI networks when measuring RF has some very useful data e.g. addresses, network names (including hidden), channels, frequency, signal strength dBm, approximate distance from your location, equipment manufacturer/vendors etc.. Helped me out as I was able to pin point a network ~ 200m away (at a school) that would be using signal amps & extenders etc..

# Thread: How do you use a body voltage meter?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-do-you-use-a-body-voltage-meter.29583/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 3
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Woodstock — 2024-10-10T19:08:59+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-do-you-use-a-body-voltage-meter.29583/post-340763>

I was listening to one of Dr. jack’s podcast interviews about doing the sphinx in the sunrise and that you should use a body voltage meter. I purchased one and thought this would be self explanatory. But I am not understanding exactly what I’m supposed to do. I took it outside and plugged in the grounding plug to my outside AC outlet As this is what the instructions said to do. I stood on the bare ground and the reading was the same as when I stood on the concrete patio, around 0.040. I wonder why it doesn’t go to zero while on the ground? Electrical lines? Then I sat in my new zero gravity lounge chair I got to put in the sun and be outside as much as possible. This was sitting on my concrete patio. Sitting in the chair in reclined position the meter went to zero. Can anyone explain what this means and if I should be doing anything different? Th is the first area to get sun in my yard. I go on sunrise walks to get to where I am seeing the sun come over the horizon but also want to be able to come home and do sphinx in my yard as soon as there is sun on it. Is the goal for the grounding meter to be at zero? Sorry if this is a dumb question. I am new here and have watched and read and searched as much as I can in the last few days. Trying to get on board with the program!

### Anthony Smith — 2024-10-10T22:57:06+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-do-you-use-a-body-voltage-meter.29583/post-340781>

The body voltage reading is only valid if you are not double grounded. It measure the electric field you are in that is being induced into your body which is acting as an antenna. The measurement happens when the field goes to ground through the meter. If you are double grounded skin in dirrect contact with the ground OR you are sitting on something that is grounded the meter reading is off because some of the field is now going to ground directly NOT through the meter. A body voltage meter does NOT measure ground currents, it measures body voltage going to ground. I expect your chair is metal and there is rebar in the concrete going down into the ground. Both wooden decks and concrete surfaces can be good grounds, NOT asphalt.

Wear shoes outside, plug the body voltage ground cord into the house ground or a ground spike in the ground and find a place with a zero reading. That tells you there is no electric fields in the air being induced into your body from nearby buildings or power lines. Make like the sphinx in that location.

### Woodstock — 2024-10-11T07:29:25+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-do-you-use-a-body-voltage-meter.29583/post-340817>

> [Anthony Smith said:](/goto/post?id=340781)
>
> The body voltage reading is only valid if you are not double grounded. It measure the electric field you are in that is being induced into your body which is acting as an antenna. The measurement happens when the field goes to ground through the meter. If you are double grounded skin in dirrect contact with the ground OR you are sitting on something that is grounded the meter reading is off because some of the field is now going to ground directly NOT through the meter. A body voltage meter does NOT measure ground currents, it measures body voltage going to ground. I expect your chair is metal and there is rebar in the concrete going down into the ground. Both wooden decks and concrete surfaces can be good grounds, NOT asphalt.
>
> Wear shoes outside, plug the body voltage ground cord into the house ground or a ground spike in the ground and find a place with a zero reading. That tells you there is no electric fields in the air being induced into your body from nearby buildings or power lines. Make like the sphinx in that location.

Wow! Thanks so much!

### Kpack12 — 2024-10-22T18:51:32+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/deuterium-depleted-water.29595/post-341392>

> [Hon Wu said:](/goto/post?id=340915)
>
> have you tested it for impurities? pesticides?

I'm not familiar with this brand, but it's my understanding that creating DDW essentially involves distilling the water over and over so that the heavier water molecules with deuterium drop out. This would, I believe, by default completely eliminate any impurities like heavy metals, pesticides, hormones, etc.

### BruceKing — 2024-11-17T15:28:06+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/deuterium-depleted-water.29595/post-342485>

> [Kpack12 said:](/goto/post?id=341392)
>
> I'm not familiar with this brand, but it's my understanding that creating DDW essentially involves distilling the water over and over so that the heavier water molecules with deuterium drop out. This would, I believe, by default completely eliminate any impurities like heavy metals, pesticides, hormones, etc.

Still learning on this, but: It looks like vacuum distillation of water is needed to lower the boiling point of water so that the D2O, which turns into steam at approximately 1.5 degrees celsius hotter than H2O at sea level, stays behind and you are left with mostly H2O. Also noted is that H2O has a higher boiling point than D2O when placed under pressure, so I guess when pressure is taken off water (under vacuum) the boiling point temperature difference is expanded so it's easier to extract the D2O. So, it looks like you either need a precise temperature distiller, vacuum distiller, or some sort of fractional distiller to make D2O depleted water (there are other methods but they don't seem economically viable). I messaged the LiteWater folks [https://www.drinklitewater.com/](https://www.drinklitewater.com/) and asked them what they use to deplete the D2O from water. I will post once I find out. Maybe we could create a D2O depleted water co-op if everyone pitched in for the equipment?

### BruceKing — 2024-11-18T13:47:08+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/deuterium-depleted-water.29595/post-342563>

The reply from [https://www.drinklitewater.com/](https://www.drinklitewater.com/) was - _"...the process to create it involves Low-Temperature Vacuum Rectification. This sophisticated method requires specialized columns that can reach up to sixty feet in height. It effectively mimics and enhances natural processes like condensation, precipitation, and evaporation to efficiently reduce the deuterium content in water."_

# Thread: When sharing with opposers and naysayers
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/when-sharing-with-opposers-and-naysayers.29602/>
**Subforum:** Feedback/Suggestions
**Posts:** 1
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### jamesccg — 2024-10-13T00:51:06+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/when-sharing-with-opposers-and-naysayers.29602/post-340907>

When sharing with those on the fence, or those who often find their friends, family, colleagues, and probably strangers too, are critical of the value of the sun, and specially tuned NIR/UVB Light Therapies...

If any are inclined to understand and appreciate the value of a well-balanced/well-mastered song or soundtrack, then understandably, they would probably also feel tortured if someone played their favorite song - that motivates or soothes them at the right time - and moved all the bands of the EQ to 0dB, then only cranked one of them to the max, and then blared the volume.

It seems to me, that this is precisely analogous to the torture that our bodies silently endure, when subjected to the majority of LED and Fluorescent artificial lighting sources, especially when tuned to produce bright blue 5500K light, or even blue-green 6500K-9500K lighting in some commercial environments. Sure they may have some of the other frequencies of the visible, or even the invisible spectrum, but they are often blaring the most piercing portions of the visible light frequency band, so loudly, not to mention with an ever present 'skip' (the flickering that's imperceptible to our eyes, but wreaks havoc on every internal process), that we literally can't think straight as a result sometimes. And many are clueless to the overwhelm.

If you have a family or friend who looks at you as if you're crazy when you try to share Dr Kruse's teachings on the power that light has to heal or harm; What's wrong with asking them plainly:

"Would you sit in a room for 18 hours a day, with a stereo that has an EQ tuning the 8000hz band all the way up, and all the others on minimum, with the volume cranked to 10?"

Then gently say something along the lines of:

"Me either. That would be torture eh? And that, is precisely what Blue lights from the vast majority of displays and indoor lighting is doing to our bodies. Though we can't hear the light with our ears, the individual cells 'hear' the harsh forms of artificial light, and they're in complete agony.

Can you imagine trying to get work done with a stereo blaring all day with such an EQ tuning? Even if it's your favorite playlist... It would be like torture.

What's wrong with the idea of giving your body a break, by trying one simple change. like some old school 2300k incandescent bulbs at home, and see how you feel?"

Then go from there... Hope this helps someone share more of this with others in need.

\-James


══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# Thread: Iridology?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/iridology.29605/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 1
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Adamo — 2024-10-13T15:36:24+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/iridology.29605/post-340925>

This is my first post, and hopefully my question is not repetitive or misunderstood.
Very happy to be apart of the community.

Curious if there are any case-studies or research out there pertaining to what is really happening with the eye(s), and then how it interacts with light following extended fresh juice fasts or water fasts.

**_Why do I ask?_** So many people that go through the process of a "cleanse" whether it is by a fresh-fruit juicing only or water fast for an extended period of time (several days to several weeks), often demonstrate/experience a change in the patterning of the eyes as well as the colouring (depth or darkness of their iris). Tons of health and food "guru's" have their explanations as to why this happens, but it can come off a bit woo-woo.

**Is there any improvement with how light is then processed after these changes are seen? No impact at all? What is actually happening to see this change in the eye and does it have any overall "health" and/or functionality impacts?**

I have always found it very interesting how the clarity and appearance of the eyes can change, and wondered if there is any functional improvement, or just airy-fairy explanations and purported "benefits."

Thanks.

I am helping a friend who has developed some pretty bad sensitivity to nnEMF. She lives in the south and spends a lot of time in the sun. Taylor

### Woodstock — 2024-10-14T23:28:42+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/neural-zoomer.29620/post-341004>

Has anyone taken a Neural Zoomer test from Vibrant Wellness? It showed Epstein Barr Virus and Streptococcal A in the severe range. I believe these to be chronic infections as I had symptoms of what is now called PANDAS when I was young and my mom was diagnosed with EBV then so I could have contracted that from her. I also have Lyme and used to have severe Fibromyalgia/CFS. Also mold exposure. A lot of encephalitis type of antibodies showed up on this recent testing. I had this done before discovering Dr Jack and plan to get some basic testing his team suggested in the initial emails I received after signing up here. Following the advice on sunshine, morning sun, etc. working on cold adaptation as well. I can’t move to the tropics just yet. My nurse practitioner did not know what to say about these tests. So I am trying to learn as much as I can before scheduling a consult with Dr Jack. I feel like I might get the right advice from him vs the crappy advice I have mostly received thus far.

Thanks. I appreciate the links. I have already been searching the forum for posts on Lyme. Very interesting but some of it is kind of hard for me to fully comprehend. When you say building biologist, I have already switched to no WiFi and wired Ethernet in my home 5 years ago. And got cut off switch for bedrooms. Also have had professionals to detect mold and had remediation done. The damage was not extensive but I’ve been exposed to mold multiple times throughout my life. What I don’t get about my “root cause” is that I was sick from birth. At least with gut issues as a baby. I don’t really know what happened the first month of my life because I’m adopted and I think maybe I didn’t get all the love and bonding that newborns need. Maybe this is significant and why I have just always felt like crap and don’t know what healthy feels like. And I likely got the Lyme around age 4. Born in ‘69. This is long before blue light from screens. But I would get “attacked” sometimes in a shopping mall with the fluorescent's lights and get this horrible gut pain and ringing in my ears. I also had POTS and sometimes even blacked out if I got up too fast. I had cats so I am sure I had bartonella from a young age. It was the 70s so we ate total crap food in my house. I had joint pain and muscle aches from childhood that would in my late 20s be diagnosed as Fibromyalgia. I didn’t get the Lyme diagnosis until age 50 and now am 55. These latest tests are showing leaky gut, and a lot of Neurological stuff. I am on bioidentical hormones but need to adjust the prescription. I actually feel better now than I have for most of my life so I have to wonder what these tests would have looked like when I felt my worst. Maybe these tests aren’t accurate or are useless. But the EBV and Strep seem to be very consistent with my lifelong chronic issues, so I could that to be very interesting and would love to know what else I can do about it. Of course the sun and light exercise and cold therapy. What else?

### Woodstock — 2024-12-03T04:58:14+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/neural-zoomer.29620/post-343207>

> [zingerburgs said:](/goto/post?id=343200)
>
> I am really interested in your story. I had Epstein Barr Virus years ago and recently found I had Strep. Are the 2 x related? Have you found any interesting articles on EBV? What I found interesting here was also the mention of PANDAS as well which my daughter has been suspected to have. My other daughter recently also showed a type of STREP on a test as is currently doing a course of debio homeopathy.

What I remember as a kid was constantly going to the doctor and told I had “tonsillitis” but the strep culture always came back negative. I am pretty sure I had strep but for some reason the testing was not showing it. They always gave me a round of penicillin even though the culture was negative. Maybe that is why it didn’t show up in the test. I had 11 rounds of antibiotics over the course of 2 years so pretty much eve every 2 months I was going to the doctor to get a new strep culture and a new round of Penicillin. I had temper tantrums when I was age 2-6. So I would think PANDAS would now be diagnosed. And the tests they have for step and EBV are DNA based rather than whatever method they used sticking the swab down your throat back in the day. I have had chronic fatigue since childhood. But when you always feel like crap you don’t have much to compare it to. I would consider that with your kids. I don’t think my mom really knew or understood. It’s like she was too close to the situation to see it for what it was. Sometimes you need an objective opinion from someone further away to pick up on things. My son is 18 and he likely had strep and mono recently. It was going around campus. Then he was doing better and came home for Thanksgiving and got sick again. I have staph in my sinus and I am worried he picked up some of my germs in the house and reactivated it. I am in Costa Rica now—just got here yesterday—and I am feeling better. Maybe we still have mold in the house. Why did he get sick when he came home? I feel awful about it. I think I need to do an ERMI test in the house.

### Mat.I — 2025-01-30T09:46:05+0200

I guess the use has to be very controlled, & strategic i.e.. not to be a long-term energy crutch for underlying mito disfunction. Similar to the story with caffeine use. I personally do not take it. If I had a reason to, then yes I would consider it for that specific purpose.

### rtd — 2025-01-30T23:27:38+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/nicotine.29621/post-346003>

> [Mat.I said:](/goto/post?id=345989)
>
> I guess the use has to be very controlled, & strategic i.e.. not to be a long-term energy crutch for underlying mito disfunction. Similar to the story with caffeine use. I personally do not take it. If I had a reason to, then yes I would consider it for that specific purpose.

Induced dopamine hits. I was (am) a slave to a few; choose your masters. Hard to stop addiction yet do-able. Forming a new body/health/mind/spirit setpoint or new baseline is quite the process.

### Inger — 2025-01-31T07:58:45+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/nicotine.29621/post-346022>

> [rtd said:](/goto/post?id=346003)
>
> Induced dopamine hits. I was (am) a slave to a few; choose your masters. Hard to stop addiction yet do-able. Forming a new body/health/mind/spirit setpoint or new baseline is quite the process.

yes it is very hard. I understand drug addiction a little bit better now. Stopping any drug or stimulant completely is like exposing your wounds open and naked.
And then tend to them.
It is beautiful and hard at he same time, it is quite the journey

### Sammyd94 — 2025-01-31T19:51:07+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/nicotine.29621/post-346040>

Yes, very true. keep in mind most patches do contain a carcinogen, i'd opt for organic tobacco such as Manitou or American Spirit. Indigenous cultures smoked organic tobacco for hundreds of years with no health concerns.

### Jacks — 2025-01-31T20:55:19+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/nicotine.29621/post-346044>

I've used nicotine gum on occasion when I'm around a lot of jabbed folks in the last few years (chew, insert between teeth and gum for 15 mins, then spit), but have never found it addictive. I smoked briefly a very long time ago and found that highly addictive but was able to stop before it got too strong.

### Shadow — 2025-04-14T23:42:14+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/nicotine.29621/post-350700>

I use nicotine gum on days that I fly as there is so much exposure to people. I have not gotten sick and have no desire for nicotine on days between flights. I just have to remember to take it to the airport with me and chew it _after TSA_ as they wind me up enough.

### Anthony Smith — 2025-04-15T02:48:29+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/nicotine.29621/post-350711>

It is my understanding that nicotine by itself is not addictive. “They” added specific ingredients to make cigarettes additive. Smoking is probably not a good idea for many reasons but nicotine patches (or gum) in todays world may offer some welcome protection.

# Thread: Please Help Me Orient
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/please-help-me-orient.29622/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 4
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### kovudux — 2024-10-15T03:44:39+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/please-help-me-orient.29622/post-341021>

Hello,

I am requesting help locating the protocols. Please point me in the right direction.

I have spent hours and days trying different methods to sift through the information on this site. I do not know where to look for the actual protocols. When I look at the"Beginner's Area" I do not find them. When I look in the "Working the Protocols" section it appears to be a collection of questions and comments pertaining to each protocol organized by each protocol category, however, I don't find the actual protocols with Dr. Kruse's recommendations for each respective protocol. I thought maybe the protocols would be the initial post of each section, however, when I navigate to the final page of a section and begin working my way backwards through the pages I still do not find it. I see many links posted in answer to similar queries that do not seem to navigate to functional pages. I also see many posts of criticism and frustration from veteran members of this site picking on new people saying that you haven't read or you're lazy and so on. I would appreciate it if I do not get these responses. This forum has over 17K threads with over 275K messages and even if I narrow that all down to Jack's messages it is still over 43K. I am not lazy and I am wanting to read if I can find where the actual protocol content is.

I do not know if each of these are protocols. If these are then these are the protocols I am wanting to find:

\- Leptin Rx
\- [Adrenal Rx and Leaky Gut Rx](https://forum.jackkruse.com/forums/adrenal-rx-and-leaky-gut-rx.21/)
\- [The New Monster Thread](https://forum.jackkruse.com/forums/the-new-monster-thread.23/)
\- [Cold Thermogenesis](https://forum.jackkruse.com/forums/cold-thermogenesis.24/)
\- [Factor X](https://forum.jackkruse.com/forums/factor-x.25/)
\- [Mitochondrial Rx](https://forum.jackkruse.com/forums/mitochondrial-rx.34/)
\- [The EMF Rx](https://forum.jackkruse.com/forums/the-emf-rx.35/)
\- [Redox Rx](https://forum.jackkruse.com/forums/redox-rx.46/)

If there are more protocols than in the list above I am interested in those as well.

Love & Light,
Emily

### harezlak19 — 2024-10-15T03:48:46+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/please-help-me-orient.29622/post-341022>

### [Getting Started Guide](https://jackkruse.com/getting-started/)

Welcome to JackKruse.com! If you’re like, well, everyone who comes to the site, you might be feeling a touch overwhelmed by all the content that’s presented in the blog, podcast and forums. Whew! We’re going to do our best to help you dig in and get some traction with this information so you

 jackkruse.com

Hope this helps!

### kovudux — 2024-10-15T03:53:48+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/please-help-me-orient.29622/post-341023>

God bless you! I didn't know there was an entirely different section of the site I needed to explore.

# Thread: MSH and C4a labs?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/msh-and-c4a-labs.29625/>
**Subforum:** Optimal Labs
**Posts:** 3
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Woodstock — 2024-10-15T21:32:37+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/msh-and-c4a-labs.29625/post-341060>

I am going to get some bloodwork and trying to add on a few things I’ve seen in the blogs. I have Lyme and biotoxin illness so I got from one of Dr Jack’s blogs to check MSH and C4a at the same time as a marker to watch. I order my own testing because I don’t have health insurance. But when I look for C4a the closest is a Complement Component C4c. I have googled and nothing comes up for C4c. Only C4a and C4b. Does a C4c even exist? I wonder if it is a typo or maybe it stands for complete meaning that a and b are combined. Literally nothing on a google search or Wikipedia for C4c. The test is only $35 but I dont want to waste my money. I think I will just order it as it’s an inflammation marker. It’s gotta be better than nothing. If anyone knows the answer I would appreciate it.

### BabyBecca — 2024-10-16T02:30:26+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/msh-and-c4a-labs.29625/post-341073>

I THINK there is a C4c but that is not what you want (ironically I have been looking into this today as well. The best I can tell you want C4a by RIA (radioimmunoassay). Apparently many labs do not offer this test because the blood sample must be cared for a certain way (placed on ice....). I am starting search to see what lab will run this test for me, I am located in Southern US.

### Woodstock — 2024-10-16T19:23:59+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/msh-and-c4a-labs.29625/post-341095>

# Thread: Is there a protocol or hacks for acute illness/viral symptoms?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/is-there-a-protocol-or-hacks-for-acute-illness-viral-symptoms.29632/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 8
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Woodstock — 2024-10-18T00:46:35+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/is-there-a-protocol-or-hacks-for-acute-illness-viral-symptoms.29632/post-341154>

Hi to everyone. I am new here and have been outside at sunrise daily the last 10 days and working on fixing my circadian rhythm and implementing some things I wasn’t already doing like blue light blocking glasses. I have really been loving all of it and had already made a lot of the changes years ago like no Wi-Fi and reducing cell phone use etc. I was surprised to wake up at 2 am with a sore throat, swollen glands and headache and I am feeling a bit of sinus stuff and irritation in my right eye despite ditching my contact lenses. I already have been using a nicotine patch for the last couple years whenever I feel any symptoms coming on and that usually reverses it fairly quickly. I also nebulize with nano silver as that always helps. I did not get the jabs and I’ve never done a Covid test though I have been sick several times since March 2020, especially in the first 2 years. I have a history of Lyme/fibromyalgia/cfs/IBS/leaky gut/mold/sinus infections and a recent Neural Zoomer test shows off the chart EBV and Streptococcus A is in the red/high zone. I had a history of “tonsillitis“ as a kid that was treated for two years with 11 rounds of Penicillin until they finally just took out the tonsils. Also gut issues have been present since birth. My temper tantrums from a toddler on and severe depression and ENT stuff makes me think it would have been diagnosed as PANDAS today. I am working on learning and implementing the Leptin RX and the other things suggested to start with from the blogs in healing the mitochondria. i am just wondering if there is any advice anyone can give me on how to knock out this acute sore throat/sinus/headache/mild fever that started at 2am other than nicotine patch and nebulizing silver and sitting outside in the sun that I am already doing? What works for you all when you get hit with something acute? I assume this could be a re-activation of the Strep or EBV that showed up in the recent tests. But also was around my son who left his college campus and dropped by yesterday so maybe he passed something he was asymptomatic for but my weak immune system couldn’t handle? Or could this be a detox from being in the sun more or from working on cold adaptation? I know this isn’t the place to ask for medical advice but I honestly trust that most of you probably know more than any doc or nurse practitioner I’ve been seeing in recent months and any tips on hacking acute symptoms would be much appreciated. I am signed up for the Q and A Saturday and really hope to be feeling up to at least listening in. Thank you Dr. Kruse for all that I have learned so far from podcasts, blogs and forums and thanks also to all the people here who contribute their experiences so we can all live our best lives.

Thank you Dr. Kruse for all that I have learned so far from podcasts, blogs and forums and thanks also to all the people here who contribute their experiences so we can all live our best lives.

A phrase you will hear often from Dr. Jack... Redox instead of Detox... therefore I believe you need strong UV light in your life and the best way to kick a virus is with the SUN... Sunrise may not be enough, you need UV light.

### Woodstock — 2024-10-18T02:40:31+0300

I really appreciate your reply! I have been sitting in the sun as much as possible. Got quite a deep tan the last two days prior to waking up at 2am with sore throat. That’s why I was surprised. Wow does ditching the contacts and sunglasses work! I mean it’s been sunny here in Colorado but I don’t recall getting so tan this time of year before. i was wondering if all that sun was causing a detox and I am possibly herxing from it? my brain is fuzzy right now due to the headache pain. Having a hard time researching any further at the moment. I am no stranger to pain. But I just want to hack this. Going to go on a moonrise walk as I seem to recall moonlight can be helpful too and the sun is already behind the mountains and moonrise is happening soon. Full moon tonight, maybe full moon is why I woke up at 2 am and couldn’t go back to sleep? I know sleep is key to healing but usually can’t sleep when I feel this crappy. I hesitate to take Pharma for sleep tonight (Valium) but weighing the cons of zero sleep to possible sleep tonight with a low dose of it.

### digitald3 — 2024-10-18T02:47:40+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/is-there-a-protocol-or-hacks-for-acute-illness-viral-symptoms.29632/post-341162>

More sun, no moonlight.... do you get moonlight in your bedroom? if so, black our curtains.. Dr. Jack will also say that lunatics roam in the "lunar" moonlight.. Dr Jack is not a fan of moonlight.. when the sun sets.. the light goes away...

Its completely possible that your redox just isn't revved up enough to kick this illness...

### Woodstock — 2024-10-18T05:02:44+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/is-there-a-protocol-or-hacks-for-acute-illness-viral-symptoms.29632/post-341164>

>
> Its completely possible that your redox just isn't revved up enough to kick this illness...

Ok thanks so much for that clarification about the moon. It seems strange to me when women’s cycles are healthier when they line up with the moon. My cycle didn’t line up with the moon for most of my pre-menopause years and when it finally did Ingot a lot of relief. Then I rejected the moon for a long time because of all the BS the alien disclosure people say about it being a spaceship with evil aliens on it and then I did enough deep research on these disclosure folks and caught them in enough contradictions that I came to the conclusion that they are full of shit and trying to keep us separated from nature. I use blackout curtains when I sleep. It’s mainly just the moonrise that I resonate with and how planting times are with the new moon and tonight is actually the Harvest Moon and it’s harvest time. Also I just got back from my walk and remembered that I tripped and fell on my 2nd or third sunrise walk when I first started getting up early for the sunrise. My knee has an infected wound. It was hurting a bit tonight and I have been getting staph infections lately. I wonder if the infected knee is what ran me down and weakened my immune system! Makes sense to me but I am no neurosurgeon or doc of any kind. Just trying to hack this chronic illness I came into life with. Despite that, I have had a really good life so far and I feel very blessed in many ways. And the Q and A Saturday is very important to me as I have been driven from a young age to understand the world. My chronic illness is actually a huge blessing because if it hadn’t been for this sickness it’s very unlikely I would have stumbled onto the Danny Jones podcast. I am very passionate about the history and how we got to where we are now and wanting to fully understand as much as I can. Knowledge is power and I hope that it empowers me to do my part to help change things and make the world a better place for everyone. Much gratitude to you all and Dr. Jack.

### Chlo_e — 2024-10-18T12:00:04+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/is-there-a-protocol-or-hacks-for-acute-illness-viral-symptoms.29632/post-341173>

When I was listening to a discussion on melatonin recently, I was intrigued to hear that the presence of a full moon reduced melatonin levels in study participants even when there was no moonlight penetrating their sleeping area. I.e they were not exposed to the moonlight itself but melatonin levels dipped in both men and women during this time of the month. The researcher is Dr Deanna Minich who was pulling a lot of the studies together. So perhaps in a low-redox person this monthly drop could contribute to lowered repair functions and associated symptoms

### Woodstock — 2024-10-18T14:34:05+0300

Thats really interesting. Thanks for your response.

### Woodstock — 2024-10-18T19:26:03+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/is-there-a-protocol-or-hacks-for-acute-illness-viral-symptoms.29632/post-341188>

Great news! My own hacks worked. I doubled my nicotine patch to 14mg instead of 7mg and kept in on all night. I usually remove because it causes too active of dreams and not restful sleep but figured it was worth it. I nebulized with Silver as often as I could. My other go to’s are “Airborne“ tablets original orange flavor that you drop in water and contains C and zinc etc. Also Doterra “On Guard” lozenges. My blood pressure was up last night but ok now. Did my sunrise walk. Gonna sit in the sun as much as I can today. It’s cool but sunny today here. I have a lot of work to do to heal my mitochondria and not have to be constantly warding off whatever TF this is (strep, ebv, other) but for now I am just going to keep using these hacks until I don’t need them anymore. Would love to hear what works for others. But maybe you all don’t get viral symptoms? I don’t recognize Covid as being viral because when I got the first round of it in March 2020 I was vacationing in a 5G area so I have always thought it was the 5G. But I don’t really know. I think it made the Lyme worse (isn’t Lyme a bio-weapon?) and re-activated a lot of “retroviruses“ like strep and EBV.

# Thread: Metal dental spacer
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/metal-dental-spacer.29635/>
**Subforum:** Optimal Kids
**Posts:** 2
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Jessnet3 — 2024-10-18T07:43:18+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/metal-dental-spacer.29635/post-341170>

Hi Jack,

I’m the mother of 3 children, two of whom have PANS/PANDAS, that spoke to you about a month ago on the monthly call.

We are making preparations to leave for the winter to the equator. We already homeschooled 2 of my 3 and we’re taking our third out of school as well so we can make this happen (she is at a unique nature school where they are primarily outdoors all day, but we decided that home long term for her too would be best).

It eluded me why both my P/P kids had multiple dental caries as we practice good oral hygiene and eat local, low-processed foods (I make nearly everything from scratch). No excess sugars/carbs. The missing piece in the equation was the EMF story, which I absolutely hate myself for not understanding before. After reading your blogs I more fully understand the issue with their oral microbiome.

My one son lost a molar from a deep cavity that lead to an infection. He is the child with the babesia infection. His dentist wants to put a metal spacer in, and I am agonizing over this decision as the last thing he needs is an antenna in his mouth for years. However I am told the alternative damage can be far worse.

Any input would be much appreciated.

### digitald3 — 2024-10-18T16:26:28+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/metal-dental-spacer.29635/post-341178>

Ask your dentist to make a removable one out of acrylic. Dentists don’t prefer removable ones as often. They are easily not worn. But maybe your dentist will be able to think of a non mental fixed solution, I can think of a way that this could be done just not sure how well it would work in real life. The reason to maintain space is to have room for the adult teeth after a baby tooth is lost. In a centralized dentist office it’s easier to maintain space than to recreate it.

# Thread: This podcast helped un-confuse me!

### Woodstock — 2024-10-18T21:37:28+0300

# Thread: Bad Breath, Dandruff, and Sneezing - Linked?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/bad-breath-dandruff-and-sneezing-linked.29654/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 8
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### robtherhino — 2024-10-20T21:38:15+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/bad-breath-dandruff-and-sneezing-linked.29654/post-341301>

Help needed!

I've been living a Quantum lifestyle now for over a year.
Have had SIBO in the past.

I consistently have bad breath, dandruff, and histamine / allergy-like symptoms.
My guess is they are linked to a gut issue.

Here is what I have been doing for the last year...
\- I'm in sunrise and UVA/UVB light daily. (Northern Romania - 46N)
\- Blocking artificial light at night (blue blockers, red bulbs, low LUX)
\- Eating mostly eggs, meat, and seasonal produce (occasional fruit and dairy, no alcohol)
\- I'm the most tanned I've ever been - esp on stomach.
\- Daily cold exposure (topless at sunrise - approx 2C)
\- Drinking sole water / adding celtic sea salt to drinking water
\- Grounding daily (AM in dew and throughout the day).
\- Mitigating emf (ethernet laptop, phone on airplane mode, no devices plugged in bedroom, etc.)

Here is what I am not doing...
\- eating lost of DHA-rich foods (having a teaspoon of lumpfish eggs daily)
\- sleeping before 10pm (usually between 10 and 11pm, occasionally after 12).
\- eating lots of liver, organs, and bone broth

Are these the missing links?

Anything else I am missing?
Or will it just take time?

### Robert Zulu — 2024-10-22T20:53:57+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/bad-breath-dandruff-and-sneezing-linked.29654/post-341401>

Being exposed to Romanian dentistry I'd add a daily waterpik routine. That fixed the bad breath issue for me.

### doctorwu85 — 2024-10-22T21:54:55+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/bad-breath-dandruff-and-sneezing-linked.29654/post-341403>

Uncle Jack said recently (on a Powwow if I'm not mistaken) that dandruff is a body clock mismatch issue.

Hard to imagine anyone getting better at 46N without high DHA, even with the protocol you've put together. UJ has said that ancestrally the thing that allowed people to thrive in those environments was consuming large amounts of DHA.

I'm at 34N and the sun is already getting a lot weaker -- 2 hours or less of UV5-6. Can't imagine how little good UV you're getting at 46. You're probably not charging up enough, both from a light perspective and a DHA perspective.

### sheas — 2024-10-23T00:48:05+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/bad-breath-dandruff-and-sneezing-linked.29654/post-341410>

> Here is what I am not doing...
> \- eating lost of DHA-rich foods (having a teaspoon of lumpfish eggs daily)
> \- sleeping before 10pm (usually between 10 and 11pm, occasionally after 12).
> \- eating lots of liver, organs, and bone broth
>
> Are these the missing links?
>
> Anything else I am missing?
> Or will it just take time?

We will be moving to Romania (Arad) in a year or so and I am wondering how it will be going further north from where we are now (Texas). Maybe you need to do more cold? Incorporate cold water? And I think it would be easier there to get low Deuterium water from springs in the mountains. One thing that has helped me the most is having a building biologist out to measure the actual nnEMF's and I literally had to turn the breaker off to my bedroom at night to create a proper sleeping sanctuary. Just unplugging everything wasn't enough. Actually I just leave the breaker off because we don't need it. Also turning WIFI off at night. You might be more exposed to nnEMF's than you think. My back pain was cut in half after turning off the electrical breaker to my bedroom. If I remember correctly, Romania has fiber optic WIFI. Switching from cable to fiber optics is what flared up my low back. I put it together when the building biologist was here. Also are you wearing red blue blocking glasses at night? Might want to try that if not.

Good info above from [@sastewie](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/30805/) . I was thinking this as well but forgot to mention, you should probably incorporate CT with cold water. Even a long time in cold air probably isn't doing nearly as much as 10-15 minutes (more is better) in 8-9 degree C water.

### Tarun — 2024-10-20T22:11:42+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/boiling-water-for-tea.29655/post-341303>

I've searched on the forum, but couldn't find a post so here it goes:

Does heating water in a....

1) electric kettle
2) ceramic cooktop
3) induction cooktop

....reduce the health benefit of the water and should be avoided?

These are the only options available to me for drinking tea, should I quit the habit altogether?

### dcetlin — 2024-10-20T23:08:59+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/boiling-water-for-tea.29655/post-341304>

My understanding is hot water increases body assimilation of Fluoride (if the water is contaminated).

I recall Uncle Jack recommends brewing iced tea if you must drink it.

Perhaps hot tea is fine if using unflouronated water?

Caffein is another story.

Not sure about method of heating effect on structure (or oxygenation) of water, nor if that really is of consequence.

### Joseph LeBlanc — 2024-10-20T23:51:26+0300

Boiling water increases deuterium concentration bc protium vaporizes first

### dcetlin — 2024-10-21T01:27:57+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/boiling-water-for-tea.29655/post-341308>

Just like how the snow that is first to melt is the most deuterium-depleted.

Interesting that the effect is also true in liquid -> gas phase change.

Is it due to protium’s smaller atomic mass than deuterium?

### Joseph LeBlanc — 2024-10-21T02:19:55+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/boiling-water-for-tea.29655/post-341309>

> [dcetlin said:](/goto/post?id=341308)
>
> Is it due to protium’s smaller atomic mass than deuterium?

Yes. Things with smaller mass require less energy to move.

Kinetic energy is (1/2) x (mass) x (velocity)squared. Wanna move things with more mass? Costs more energy.

Wanna move things to faster speeds? Costs more energy.
